The MAT 2026 exam result for admission to the MBA course for the CBT and the PBT modes will be announced soon.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is the latest expected JEE Main cutoff for the year?
faqs.answer:
NIT Manipur JEE Main cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to the BTech courses. During the Round 1 cutoff, the closing rank for CSE was 25886 for the General category students under the AII India Quota. Among OBC candidates, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 8750. faqs.question: Can I get admission at Maharashtra Institute of Technology without CAT?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get admission in the Maharashtra Institute of Technology MBA course without CAT, since the institute accepts multiple other national and state-level entrance exams for its MBA course. Candidates can go for the MAH MBA/ MMS CET/ GMAT/ MAT/ ATMA/ XAT/ CMAT, etc., exams for MBA admission. Interested students can apply for the MBA course with a valid exam score and qualifications.

placements.overview: Companies such as Tetra Pak, Tech Mahindra and Reliance Industries Ltd visited the campus during MIT Aurangabad placements 2024. Moreover, according to the information brochure 2023-24 released by Maharashtra Institute of Technology, the highest package offered during MIT Aurangabad placements in recent past stood at INR 80 LPA. Apart from this, according to NIRF report 2024 released by the Institute, the median package offered during MIT Aurangabad UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 2.95 LPA, respectively. The key highlights of MIT Aurangabad placements are mentioned in the table below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My college is good. You can get a nice faculty to communicate with.

review_content.Placements: Its about 50 percent are placed students. The highest will be up to 10 LPA and the lowest will be 30k. Its Edudiango Pvt Ltd, Bangalore, AICTE, Net Leap solutions. Its about 60 percent of students are place and the companies are Cyber Sanskar Nashik, Paarsh, Jingle Toon. Its Data Analytics, Software Developed, Full Space Web Development.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the classroom, there is a projector. The projector will be presented through a laptop and it is very easy to understand the concept and logic through the projector. The facility of Wi-Fi connection is the best for students. In the virtual labs, there are computers and a projector. There is a library too and in that library there are so many types of books. The food quality is so good. Every food item is so tasty to eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review by a genuine student of MIT CSN.

review_content.Placements: The placement is not good, likely it's average, you can get a maximum of 12 LPA. The average placement is not the college's fault, they are responsible for that.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is large, green, and well-equipped with labs, Wi-Fi, a library, sports facilities, and hostels. That's all.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very friendly and helpful Faculty members are generally described as knowledgeable, supportive, and experienced with quality teaching and regular tests. That's the real truth of college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: There is a good learning environment.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible for placements from the 7th semester. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra visit the college. The highest package offered is 7 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Around 80 percent of students get placed. I plan to pursue a career in IT.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some students' behaviour in college is bad. The environment is not very clean. Students are not allowed to sit outside. Some classrooms are poorly maintained with broken lights and switchboards, which need improvement. The campus life here is average. My interaction with my classmates is normal for studying.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college environment.

review_content.Placements: About 50% students are placed in our college. Last year, 4 to 5 mechanical students got the 5 LPA above package, and CSE students also got the normal packages in college. Training and placement cell is so supportive and good. They conducted a sample interview round for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good enough, and colleges have a big campus surrounded by trees and greenery. Give a positive and good vibe. The hostel and mess are also good, but not that good for students. They have Wi-Fi with a good internet connection. Labs are also average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students getting placed in college is nearly about 20%. The placement is not big in this college. In recent years the packages have not gotten big the highest package is about 4 LPA. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA for the job but not many students get these jobs. They get the internship for Rs. 10,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are two big buildings for this college. The college campus is very big at least 10 to 15 acres. There are Wi-Fi-enabled labs. Although Wi-Fi is not available in the classrooms. The college features a spacious library and well-structured classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of MIT Aurangabad.

review_content.Placements: The placement is decent for the Electronics & Computer Engineering department. The placement for other departments is good enough, so it can be concluded that the college is good for students other than the Electronics & Computer Engineering branch, so it's good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus has good infrastructure, and the facilities provided to students and faculty are overall good. But sometimes the facilities are poorly managed. Wi-Fi is provided, but only a few can access it. The hostel is good enough for both girls and boys.

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 54,000 - 4,95,600 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad.

To get a seat to the course, candidates must take part in the Maharashtra Institute of Technology admission process and make the course fee payment. admission_overview.college_name: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility & Fee

admission_process.title: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad Admission process 2025

paragraphs: MIT Aurangabad admission 2025 is entrance-based.Maharashtra Institute of Technology (MIT), Aurangabad offers a range ofUG, PG, andPhDlevel courses includingBTech, MTech, MBA, and BVoc. Usually, admission toMITbegins inMayand the new academic yearstarts in July. Admission to the courses is based onnational and state-levelentrance exams. Students can take admission through centralcounsellingconducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE)/State CET Cell, Mumbai, or directly at the institute level.

All the courses at the institute are offered under its nine departments. The institute provides scholarships and fee discounts to students from a minority community or getting admissionthrough CAP. Registration areopenfor UG and PG courses offered by the institute.
Students canregister online. The institute provides admissionsdirectlythrough acentralised admission process(CAP).Below mentioned are MITAurangabad coursesand fees:
Course Name
Eligibility
Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
MHT CET/JEE Main
BTech Lateral Entry
Three-years diploma in Engineering/ Technology with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
Bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
Class 12 or diploma in Science and equivalent
Graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for backward class and disabled person)
MAH MBA/ MMS CET/GMAT/CAT/MAT/ATMA/XAT/CMAT
Master’s degree
*The above-mentioned figures might change subject to directives from the concerned Govt. Regulating Authorities.

The institute placement begins in July in the pre-final and goes on till the end of the academic year. The highest package offered to students was INR 12.2 lakh in the Maharashtra Institute of Technology 2020 placement.
Course Name

MIT-WPU Application Process
Students need to fill out an online application form on the official website of MIT-Aurangabad with all the relevant information.
Entrance Exam, Result & Counselling

After filling out the MIT registration form, students must appear MIT entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds. Based on the entrance exam scores results will be declared on the official website of MIT and a merit list will be prepared through a counselling process.
Fee Payment
A provisional offer letter will be provided to students based on their performance in the selection rounds. Those who receive the offer letter will have to make the first fee installment.
Declaration of Final Offer Letter
The university releases the final offer letter after the completion of document verification. The University sends the offer letter to the student's registered email address. In the last

description: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

The Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in

Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence(AI) and Data Science was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 150474 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 194339 in 2023 and 195763 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence(AI) and Data Science demonstrated

Maharashtra Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Maharashtra Institute of Technology.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 19.45, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Polymer Technology. Refer to the table below to see the first and last-round cutoff percentiles for various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations for General catego

Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Polymer Technology turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 19.45.

For the same course, the last round cutoff was 5.6 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 1.43.

hostel_campus.college_name: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My college is good. You can get a nice faculty to communicate with.
reviews.review_text: In the classroom, there is a projector. The projector will be presented through a laptop and it is very easy to understand the concept and logic through the projector. The facility of Wi-Fi connection is the best for students. In the virtual labs, there are computers and a projector. There is a library too and in that library there are so many types of books. The food quality is so good. Every food item is so tasty to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Review by a genuine student of MIT CSN.
reviews.review_text: The campus is large, green, and well-equipped with labs, Wi-Fi, a library, sports facilities, and hostels. That's all.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good learning environment.
reviews.review_text: Some students' behaviour in college is bad. The environment is not very clean. Students are not allowed to sit outside. Some classrooms are poorly maintained with broken lights and switchboards, which need improvement. The campus life here is average. My interaction with my classmates is normal for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough, and colleges have a big campus surrounded by trees and greenery. Give a positive and good vibe. The hostel and mess are also good, but not that good for students. They have Wi-Fi with a good internet connection. Labs are also average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are two big buildings for this college. The college campus is very big at least 10 to 15 acres. There are Wi-Fi-enabled labs. Although Wi-Fi is not available in the classrooms. The college features a spacious library and well-structured classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MIT Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The college campus has good infrastructure, and the facilities provided to students and faculty are overall good. But sometimes the facilities are poorly managed. Wi-Fi is provided, but only a few can access it. The hostel is good enough for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharashtra Institute of Technology, an autonomous institute, Chatrapati Sambhaji Nagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are often good. The campus is truly impressive. The campus features modern classrooms equipped with advanced technology. Departments are covered by Wi-Fi. The hostel is average. The mess is also average for students. Also, we have a sports room and various facilities like a cricket ground for tennis, basketball, and volleyball. There is an indoor sports room.

reviews.review_heading: average college in all condition.
reviews.review_text: the facilities provided by the college for mechanical department are not very good as compare to cse department. the quality of the facility of labs for mechanical department not really good. the classrooms or ok. the library of the college is very nice collection of the books is very large. college have decent sports and games not much focuses on sports play in annual function only.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of the college is near to the college. It is 5 minutes walk from the college. The hostel infrastructure is very good. The hostel is very clean. There are all facilities in the college and hostel. The quality of food in the mess is really good.

reviews.review_heading: Autonomous college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The next main thing needed is the college facilities. This college provides higher facilities for CSE students. Wi-Fi is provided in labs. We have big classrooms. The college has a library. It has a vast no of collections. The mess quality is good. The college has two separate canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Average college for civil engineering students.
reviews.review_text: The college is big, surrounded by a large area for infrastructure. There is a games club for students in the infrastructure. The college is autonomous and provides all the facilities for students. Facilities like unlimited Wi-Fi access in the practical labs and classrooms are available with advanced technology, and up to 60 students can sit.

reviews.review_heading: Maharashtra Institute of Technology Aurangabad: A Place for Excellence.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Classrooms are highly advanced with the latest technologies. Labs are equipped with the latest technologies and equipment. There are 2 canteens with a lot of food and drinks on the menu with proper hygiene. Medical facilities are available for students in case of emergencies. High-speed Wi-Fi is available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharashtra Institute of Technology, Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have Wi-Fi on campus; it has lab connections instead. I have never stayed in the hostel, so I don't know the quality of the hostel infrastructure, but the college infrastructure is very nice and supports students in their studies.

reviews.review_heading: Mit College of Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty good with proper cleaning, and also the course provided by college is extremely perfect. The hostel is pretty good with proper cleaning, and also the course provided by college is extremely perfect. Also gives the perfect college for students.

reviews.review_heading: MIT -  an autonomous institute of technology.
reviews.review_text: The institute has a large campus with a five-story building and a large playground. There is no Wi-Fi for students, but staff have Wi-Fi access. There are four chemistry labs and four computer labs. The library is open 24 hours a day.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Maharashtra Institute of Technology

likes.text: TCS, RedHat, Cognizant, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and many more companies visit our campus for recruitment.

likes.text: Basketball and badminton courts are available, with well-lit reading rooms and a wonderful library with subscriptions to almost all the journals.
There is good quality food in canteen and there is a special game zone in college .

likes.text: Teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable; almost all teachers are at least Masters-qualified.
The course curriculum is relevant to the course and it makes the students industry-ready.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.

review_content.Placements: In the previous years, more than 70 percent of the students were placed from our college. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest package is around 2 LPA. The average package is around 5 LPA. More than 50 percent of students secure internships in top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge library of our college called the central library, which contains numerous books for students related to academic and non-academic. Food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good greenery environment for study.

review_content.Placements: Around 80 percent of the students got placed in the previous year. The highest package is around 10 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Around 70 percent of students got internships. Our top recruiters are TCS, Mahindra, Capgemini, Wipro, Infosys, Tata Motors, L&T Defence, and Bajaj Auto.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: SNJB civil branch review.

content.Placements: I'm from the Department of Civil Engineering of SNJB College. In the year 2023, around 50 percent of the students were placed. The highest package was around 7 LPA, the lowest package was 1 LPA. The average package was around 2 LPA-3 LPA. Top recruiters are Rohan Builder, Anand Developer, Arihant Buildcon, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, each classroom contains a smart board for visual learning of the graphic subject. Wi-Fi is also available. The central library is very useful for the students. Hostels are well-hygienic. Food quality is acceptable. An on-campus medical facility is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because the college infrastructure and teaching quality are good.

content.Placements: In the previous year, 75 percent of the students are placed. The average package offered is 4 to 5 LPA, the lowest package offered is 2 LPA and the highest package offered is 10 LPA. Top recruiters are Tata, Mahindra, etc. More than 75 percent of students got internship. This course offers an opportunity in various construction fields or working as labour under the contractor.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Labs are well designed with all important equipment. Classrooms are well designed for a study environment. Library contains a variety of books. Hostel food is good. The canteen provides well hygienic snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.

content.Placements: In the previous years, more than 70 percent of the students were placed from our college. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest package is around 2 LPA. The average package is around 5 LPA. More than 50 percent of students secure internships in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge library of our college called the central library, which contains numerous books for students related to academic and non-academic. Food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good greenery environment for study.

content.Placements: Around 80 percent of the students got placed in the previous year. The highest package is around 10 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Around 70 percent of students got internships. Our top recruiters are TCS, Mahindra, Capgemini, Wipro, Infosys, Tata Motors, L&T Defence, and Bajaj Auto.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus has a good study environment, which creates motivation to study.

content.Placements: As a first-year student, I will be passing out in 2029. According to the official SNJB website, in the academic year 2023-24, 23 students were placed out of 60 in the AI & IT course. The highest package was 9.5 LPA. The lowest package was 1.2 LPA. The average package was 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Jaro Education, Byju's, Infosys, and Mahindra. Jaro Education provided a package of more than 8 LPA to 5 students in the 2023-24 academic year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course is decent. There is a smart digital board in every classroom with Wi-Fi. The college has a huge central library containing a wide variety of books for specific courses. The mess provides tasty and good-quality food, including Jain food. Medical facilities are available for students 24/7 with a well-equipped dispensary on campus.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

What is the latest expected JEE Main cutoff for the year?
description: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. reviews.review_heading: SNJB civil branch review.
reviews.review_text: In our department, each classroom contains a smart board for visual learning of the graphic subject. Wi-Fi is also available. The central library is very useful for the students. Hostels are well-hygienic. Food quality is acceptable. An on-campus medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because the college infrastructure and teaching quality are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Labs are well designed with all important equipment. Classrooms are well designed for a study environment. Library contains a variety of books. Hostel food is good. The canteen provides well hygienic snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge li...

reviews.review_heading: Good greenery environment for study.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has a good study environment, which creates motivation to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is decent. There is a smart digital board in every classroom with Wi-Fi. The college has a huge central library containing a wide variety of books for specific courses. The mess provides tasty and good-quality food, including Jain food. Medical facilities are available for students 24/7 with a well-equipped dispensary on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: It was a well-structured curriculum. It obviously helps if you know exactly what field you want your career in, but they also give us one year to figure out the subjects you want to do for your major. In the long term, it doesn't matter what subjects you studied. Hostel amenities are good. Hostel rooms are spacious, and we have single and shared basis hostels. Will be provided with wardrobes, individual beds, blankets, towels, pillows, tables and chairs. Also provides laundry facilities. Mess in...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering studies with average marks and income.
reviews.review_text: It is very good and very relevant in terms of the facilities and infrastructure at this college of engineering. The library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all top-class. The food available at the mess and canteen is so nice and tasty. For sports and games, we have a very big ground to play on.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The water and electricity facilities are good. The college is clean. The food served in the canteen is not good. Staff members are not good. They are not cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the degree.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities in my college are average, as the other local colleges have. Department of artificial intelligence and data Science is at very low stage in this college of engineering. Hostel facilities is such that they provide only Jain food to the students, and the non-Jain students have to eat the jain food in this hostel 
.

reviews.review_heading: The college is too good by each parameter like placements, campus life, education, safety, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fabulous; there are many engineering marvels in the college. You have to look towards our central building; it is fabulous. The classrooms are also fully digital; in each classroom, there is one digital board and comfortable benches for sitting purposes. The labs are also too good to do our job and the whole campus is fully WI-FI connected. The hostel facility is also very good; there is also a WI-FI facility is available and many other things are good about the hostel, lik...

reviews.review_heading: An honest feedback of the college.
reviews.review_text: There are different classrooms for separate batches and years. There is a separate department for M.Pharma and B.Pharma. The college has labs for practicals. There is a Library with reading books and a digital library as well. The facilities in the hostel are good. The food is very good and medical facilities are also there. They have a Gymkhana and sports facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. Hostel for girls and boys are available. Which have great facilities. There is different hostel for boys and girls and long distance between both hostels. Food quality is also good of hostels both hostels. One day of week had special treat.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best campus. The infrastructure of our college is very good. All facilities are available in our college. All classrooms are very huge and clean. Labs, a library, and Wi-Fi are available in our college. Hostels are available in our college for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary infrastructure, equipment, and a library are provided in our college. Classrooms have projectors, blackboards, and whiteboards. Labs have good equipment. Library has many books. Wi-Fi facility and canteen are available. The infrastructure of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements count, good infrastructure, good cleanliness.
reviews.review_text: In my college they provide very good facilities. Whole campus contains Internet connectivity, labs, classrooms, library is also very good. Cleanliness is commendable. All the necessary facilities are available in the canteen, they are very good. All the important sports competitions are also held.

Below are a few more updates related to the Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

faqs.answer:
A:    Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.

faqs.answer: A:    Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences offers Degree courses including 10 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. description: Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 30956 and 80051 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closi

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 30956, 33651 and 37114, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 16586. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 19795, and the 2023 cutoff was 19631 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty,  and good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel and the quality of food available in the mess are very good. A hygienic canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are well developed and useful.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty members and good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department are very good and strong. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are very good and reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placements this year.
reviews.review_text: It has Wi-Fi and library facilities. Computer labs are used to engage students who are busy with their work. The hostel is good with neatness, a good mess, and a canteen. It has Wi-Fi and good food. Geaser Providence and many courses are offered.

reviews.review_heading: This college is value for money and learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good and comfortable. Having smart classes and smart labs with equipment loaded in labs The hostel was well-maintained, and the food was prepared with hygienic processes. Medical facilities were very fast. They didn't waste much time in emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to learn and to grow.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are the best, clean, neat, and well-maintained. Library is also good in this college. The quality of food is maintained well in this college. Sports and medical facilities are good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college for its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities. The food is good and homely. The canteen having variety of food. Good bed facilities and the floors are clean. The food available is very hygiene and homely. The mess is also very clean. Everything in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Consider all factors before choosing a college like infrastructure, placements, campus life etc.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a peaceful atmosphere. We have spacious classrooms and free access to the library. We don't have any campus hostels; we need to stay in nearby hostels located in Medchal. The hostel is monitored by college management, and we have a bus facility from the hostel to the college.

reviews.review_heading: College is the best, you can join.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there are two blocks: APJ and SRK blocks. The SRK block has laboratories, a central library, Wi-Fi, a digital library and an administrative office and placement cell located in the main SRK block. We have a college hostel; they provide homely food, Wi-Fi, washing machines, and security. The hostel fee was 50,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Good and very career oriented.
reviews.review_text: World classrooms, a digital library, the best lab equipment, and around campus, high-speed Wi-Fi. Hostel was very good in terms of food and rooms, with a large area for study hours and good infrastructure throughout the hostel campus, as well as a clean canteen and food, a medical team available at all times, a sports room, and a large playground.

reviews.review_heading: If you are the one who wants a B.Tech. degree without much restriction, then join here.
reviews.review_text: Labs will be somewhat okay but not fulfilled with all the equipment required for all the experiments; they just see the persons and give their scores according to their knowledge and the candidate behavior with the faculty. If you are the person who responds during the classes, you can expect a good impression.

reviews.review_heading: My college right now is very good overall.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours in the hostel. The quality of facilities is good in the hostel, and the quality of food in the canteen is good. Life to food is available in the canteen. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. Hot water and the core are available in the hostel. Hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is maintained well. In the hostel, there are many facilities like Wi-Fi, hot water, and delicious food. We have bus facility for hostel students. Medical facilities are also available. There are many indoor games. Mess is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A beautiful college's review.
reviews.review_text: There is a very big campus. The building is in an L shape, with one side for teaching and one side for MBAs. The classes are very big; generally, in each class, 60 to 70 people are going to be in the class. In the class, there are 160 to 180 students, so close to 4 classes are going on.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable and good college in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. All classrooms are not much good. Our college provides a hostel facility. It is with a partnership from the outside members. The hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Liberty for any distance education.
reviews.review_text:
Average lab facilities in Mallareddy Engineering College and Management Science; low lab technician; average material provided.
Nil hostel facility is provided for boys; they provided hostel facility for girls; they should pay an amount of six months in advance.

hostel_campus.college_name: Pondicherry University - Karaikal Campus Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The best quality of mess food was provided.
reviews.review_text: The best infrastructure and facilities were provided with a clean and maintained environment. Wi-Fi was not available at that time but now it is available. The quality of mess food was good and there was hygienic environment. Medical facilities were good if anyone needed them in college time.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent and beautiful. There are separate blocks for every branch and sufficient lab for practical knowledge. The well-stocked library. The whole campus wifi is enabled in labs and classes in the classrooms. The campus provides hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for girls and great campus .
reviews.review_text: I have opted for a hostel because my college is far away from home. The hostels facility for both boys and girls separately with spacious rooms and free Wi-Fi and hot water, homely food, and hostels are under CCTV surveillance, and the multiple sports grounds and infrastructure are great with good features and a pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: Pondicherry University - Karaikal Campus Review.
reviews.review_text: Pondicherry is a coastal area with beaches, and education here is the best destination. The general atmosphere is quite old-fashioned; boys and girls should not talk, and if they click pictures and send them to authorities, action is taken. The college has an amazing library where you can sit and study until 9 pm; it is open six days a week except Sunday. In the university, there is a network problem; connectivity is very low. Hostel rules are very strict—you cannot enter the hostel during class...

reviews.review_heading: Pondicherry University computer.
reviews.review_text: In my university, hostel service is quite good; we have to pay per year; it feels like 22,000 per year, including mess fests, but it was good for the local guy. Also, in hostels, Wi-Fi is also there, and per room allotted for three people, it is enough or sufficient for three people.

reviews.review_heading: Study hard, then only you will succeed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the attendance should be above 75%. Wi-Fi, projector-based classrooms, and libraries with free books. Sports and games, medical facilities, a canteen, food centers, etc. are all on campus. The hostel food is good and very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It has a great infrastructure, but placements could have been better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is the best. It is a green campus, and buses are available for students from 9 am to 5.30 pm. Hostels provide a cot, individual bed, lamp, two main lights, two fans, two cupboards, Wi-Fi, table, chairs, etc. There were proper drying areas and reading rooms on each floor. Classrooms have normal whiteboards and projectors. Labs were well-equipped. The library has a vast collection of books, and semester reference books are always available. The food charge is R...

reviews.review_heading: It is a small campus with very good infrastructure and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It is a newly built campus with very good infrastructure and will develop more in near future. We have an air-conditioned library, and a 24X7 Wi-Fi facility on campus as well as on hostel premises. The food served is good for students coming from south India. However north Indian students will have to manage a bit.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is really attractive .
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure and the college also has a good library and on this campus, the Wi-Fi facility is also available and all the students can take benefit of this facility. The college also has a good canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with poor placements in the year 2016.
reviews.review_text: The campus consists of PG courses only. The campus is not too large, but it has a very peaceful environment. The library is quite decent, with a good number of books. The library timings were just during the college timings. Labs consist of a well-equipped system and the latest configuration with high-speed Wi-Fi facility. The buildings of our campus were newly constructed. Classrooms were well-maintained with projectors, whiteboards, individual desks, etc. The infrastructure of our department w...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college if you want to do some research or self-study.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is too slow in our college. Books provided in the library are very old. Lab computers are outdated only Windows operating system is available in every computer. The food served in the hostel is very bad. Only South Indian foods are preferred. There is no canteen available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure in the library.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi strength is very good in our college. Labs are fully air-conditioned, and classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. Library is outstanding. Hostel rooms are very big, and the food served in the mess is of high class. Canteen provides food at a low price. There are big grounds where students can play cricket and football. There are separate courts for basketball and tennis on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but lesser activities provided to the students.
reviews.review_text: The course of Master Science in Computer Science is of two years. The department does have some great teachers. University has free high-speed Wi-Fi all over the campus. Hostel is also in a very good condition. Food is also good in mess and also in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Limited Wi-Fi connection (10gb high-speed per month) which is not enough for students.
reviews.review_text: M.Sc. computer Science syllabus is updated with modern computer skills. Wi-Fi is available in the classroom, lab, library and hostel room. Mobile network is poor in university campus (except BSNL). Computer Science department lab is very well defined. University hostel life is awesome and the mess food quality is medium (cost 65 rs/day for 3 times).

reviews.review_heading: Best MBA college in Pondicherry.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is one of the best things about the campus in terms both sports as well as academic infrastructure. This has very good air conditioned labs, and aluminies of this colleges also comes in handy for having good infrastructure of the college, it hosts many sport festivals through the year and brings students from all universities across india. With this kind of infrastructure lot of NGO activities are also made possible with the help of alumni helps.

admission_process.title: SSVPS's Bapusaheb Shivajirao Deore College of Engineering (SSVPS's BSD COE) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SSVPS's Bapusaheb Shivajirao Deore College of Engineering (SSVPS's BSD COE) admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CAT, etc. for admission. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Very happy with the faculty, good placements in 2017, well-reserved infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: I am from the mechanical department, and our college has a separate building for each department. Our department has the most number of labs in our college, like fluid mechanics lab, CAD lab, mechanics, etc. The labs are well maintained. Hostel facilities are also very nice and very affordable. The library of our college is very vast and has plenty of books.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good campus, placement, and good teaching. I suggest you take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is an average Wi-Fi facility in my college, and the labs are the best but old. The classrooms are neat and clean in my college, and the library is the best. It gives me the best facilities in the library. Hostel facilities are good, and they give full priority to all students. The mess and canteen tastes are good.

reviews.review_heading: I have not got any type of placements from this college.
reviews.review_text: The college is Wi-Fi enabled. The labs are good, and the library has many types of books. The hostel is on a sharing basis, with one room containing at least 2 to 3 beds. There is also mess facilities in the hostel, and the quality of food is below average. It also contains a sports room with games like chess and carrom, and also has a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Good College in Dhule district.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good and provides Wi-Fi facilities. The classrooms, staff rooms, and labs are clean, and the library of the college is full of books. The external facility provided by the college includes extra lectures on aptitude, reasoning, and English grammar for placement-related subjects. In the library, every book we need is present, like academics-related, government exam, GATE books, business, placement, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Life of engineering is difficult.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very beautiful, and the food quality is good. The canteen quality is the best, and medical facilities are available in college. There are also sports functions, and the games are very beautiful. I like to play cricket, but the Wi-Fi facility is poor. Classes are clean every day in college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best. I recommend it to many students to take admission and become perfect.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good and clean, and the food is also satisfactory. There are many hostel buildings, and rooms are available in the hostels. Parking for cars and bikes is also provided. The infrastructure of our college is good, and our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and halls are good and clean, and the college has good surroundings. The campus is clean.

reviews.review_heading: This college is wonderful, and the teachers and professors provide excellent teaching.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good and clean, and the food is also satisfactory. There are many hostel buildings, and rooms are available in the hostels. Parking for cars and bikes is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: College needs to improve its placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was good; classrooms are big, and the library is full of books. The hostel quality was not that good; the rooms were too small and the food quality was low. The canteen has good food. Every year, sports events were organized by college management, such as cricket, football, basketball, Kabaddi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Placements of college is good.
reviews.review_text: The external facility provided by the college is an aptitude and Cloud Training. Wi-Fi is available at computer lab. In library, every book we need is present. Hostel and Canteen's food is good but hostel rooms are so small. Sports and games are organized.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and halls are good and clean. The college has good surroundings. The campus is good and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in the district.
reviews.review_text: Our college has separate Wi-Fi for students. There are high digital labs with all types of instruments, digital classrooms, and very big libraries. We have good hostels for both girls and boys with mess and canteen that serves good quality food. There are various playgrounds and play areas. Medical facilities are not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with average faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus and hostel are excellent. Free Wi-Fi is available, and the classrooms are in the best condition. The quality of food available in the hostel is average. The library of this college is very well-maintained by the librarian. The chemistry lab is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a college especially good at teaching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and hygienic. Best campus with good canteen and best in teaching. They provide good quality food best college in Dhule. Best teachers and well-experienced teachers in college.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge library with a vast variety of books, Wi-Fi is also available on the campus. The hostel facility is also good and it has a mess and canteen facility for teachers, students, and non-teaching staff. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Dhule city, with experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The quality of facilities in the hostel and overall college is quite average. The food served is average, just like every color college in this country. There is adequate space for sports activities like cricket, basketball, running, and other track events. There is also a good gym for the students having negligible cost.

Avantika University's popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The institute offers a four-year BTech specialisation in Full Stack Development, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, and UX Design. The university offers a hands-on, project-based learning approach and engages by working on real-world challenges.
Avantika University is one of the prominent universities. The university offers an MBA programme with project-based learning, block teaching, and an innovative flip classroom model. faqs.answer: A:    Avantika University admissions are either based on entrance exam scores or performance of candidates in the Personal Inteview round. Any of the affiliated colleges or institutes of Avantika University does not offer direct admission in any of the programmes offered at the undergraduate or postgraduate level. The university considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, UCEED, etc. for admission to specific programme. Avantika University also conducts written test for some of the programmes such as BBA, MBA, BCA, etc.
faqs.question: Can I join Avantika University Ujjain directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Avantika University offers 30 seats for each of its MBA specialisations. Students must complete the entire admission procedure to secure the MBA seats. For MBA seats at Avantika University must appear for the entrance exams followed by a personal interview round. Students must apply for the Avantika Management Aptitude Test (AMAT) conducted by the university for MBA admission. Further, before applying for the exams candidates must make sure to have valid MBA eligibility criteria.Eligibility Criteria: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent examination from any stream and must have obtained at least 50% aggregate in all subjects with proficiency in the English language.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for BDes at Avantika University?
overview_faqs.answer: Avantika University BDes fees comprises various components such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time admission fees. Candidates who get admission to the BDes programme at one of the affiliated colleges of Avantika University Ujjain are required to pay a one-time admission fee of INR 10,000. Mentioned below is the tabular representation of Avantika University fees for BDes programmes:Course NameTotal Tuition FeesHostel FeesBDesINR 12.80 lakh-INR 16 lakhINR 8.10 Lacs to INR 10.10 lakhNote: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Avantika University Ujjain?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for BTech at Avantika University Ujjain range from INR 4.1 Lacs – INR 7 Lakh. The fees has multiple other fee components such as one-time payment of INR 10,000. The fees must be paid annually or semester-wise depending admission payment system of the university. However, the one time fees are to be paid only once during admission.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for UG courses at Avantika University Ujjain?
overview_faqs.answer: Avantika University is a private university in Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh. The goal is to develop a passion for learning in the heads of young students. Avantika University is approved by the University Grants Commission and is connected with the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education). Avantika University fees are very reasonable, making education more accessible to every student. Avantika University fees structure varies from programme to programThe fees of UG courses at Avantika University are :Avantika University for B.Tech Fees is Rs 2,51,000 per year. Avantika University BBA Fees is Rs 1,50,000 per year. Avantika University B.Des Fees is Rs 3.30 Lacs per year. Avantika University B.Sc Fees is Rs 2.15 Lacs per year.Avantika University BFA Fees is Rs 1.20 Lacs per year.

overview_faqs.question: Is Avantika University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Avantika University can be considered as a good option to pursue the MBA programme. The affiliated colleges have good infrastructure, placements and faculty members. The highest and average package offered during Avantika University placements 2024 stood at INR 20.5 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA, respectively. Companies such as Planet Spark, TCS and Deloitte USI participate in the 2024 campus placements.

review_summary.college_name: Avantika University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Studies - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities , average faculty, fees too high, excellent curriculum.

content.Placements: My course was BBA, I studied for the first year now in second year, I have heard from my seriors that the placements are below average, a very few students from. The class get places, 10-15%, highest, package as offered to a MDes student, 2 years ago, 12 LPA, after that average package is just 5-6 LPA, even after getting an MBA, almost all students got internships, from companies like cloud zappy and many local startups, roles offered were, business development, sales, intern position for administration and management purposes.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing! Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen with good food, big sports grounds and walking area. very spacious, big and very beautiful. With a lot of greenery and natural beauty. Hostel was beautiful with a good clinic, 24/7 WiFi, water, electricity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Avantika University.

content.Placements: Currently, the placement season is going on; as of now, 6 lpa is the average package for this year; last year, it was 8.5 lpa. IBM, Capgemini, and Deloitte are some of the top recruiting companies. Internships are compulsory for 6th semester students. So there are 100% placements for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The educational infrastructure is very good; the workshops, lab, computer lab and library are well-equipped with all the necessities. The hostel mess and canteen are also exceptionally good but equally expensive. The canteen is quite affordable. We do have a medical facility but it is very poor. Sports and games are also quite good, and the gym is very well-equipped. We've got table tennis, lawn tennis, basketball, volleyball, mini-football, and cricket grounds available too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Avantika university is one of the best the University.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are remarkable, especially in fields design and engineering. Students of avantika university get place in various companies like tcs, IBM, PixelaUX, Extentia, Mindtree, u00a0L&T, etc. And also chance to work with companies via internships and get a good working experience. University provides almost 90%placements. u00a0A total of 52 companies provided internship opportunities students.
content.Infrastructure: University have beautiful, lushgreen campus. Infrastructure is awesome, hostel and mess are really nice. Internet (Wi-Fi/LAN ) is available 24*7. Library and classroom are spacious. Thus overall facilities and infrastructure avantika at Avantika are amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best University for Design and overall Development.

content.Placements: Our college takes a lot of effort towards placements as well-known companies and names are connected. Recently, out of 21 M.Des students, 17 M.Des students have been placed in excellent companies in their respective fields. In companies like Capgemini, L&T, Tata Motors, DOMS Industries, TouchMagic, Cusmat Companies, PixelaUX, Extentia, Mindtree, YUJ etc recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: 24/7 Wi-Fi Service. Equipped Labs. Both Physical and Virtual library. Excellent facilities in the Hostels. Twin sharing rooms with attached bathrooms 24/7 medical facilities. Food is highly nutritious. Non-veg strictly prohibited. Daily outings to Ujjain City and Indore outing once in a month. Sports - Football, Cricket, Table Tennis, Carrom, Chess, Badminton, etc are also available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Best Design College/ University.

content.Placements: I was student of Avantika University, I very much convinced with Avantika Academic Model. I am currently working in MNC. It is Best Design college/ University in Madhya Pradesh. Courses designed @ Avantika University are industry oriented and updated with Technology.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure @ Avantika University is good, The lush green campus is very much attractive, Legacy of Ujjain. Hostel and Mess are also good. 24/7 Internet (Wi-Fi/ LAN) available. Sports we used to play Cricket, Volley, Kabaddi. Access to classroom and Library is also 24/7.

admission_overview.college_name: Avantika University Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Application Process

admission_process.title: Avantika University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Avantika University admissionis done by written test or accepts national or state-level entrance exams for admission to various courses. The university offers various courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels in various streams such as Engineering, Management, Design, Law, etc. through its schools. Candidates can apply online on the official website of Avantika University.
Below areAvantika University coursesalong with eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 in any stream with at least 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 12 in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised board

Candidates applying for admission to Avantika University need to fulfill the eligibility criteria, and other criteria of selection for the programs. Applicants willing to seek admission at Avantika University are required to fill out the application form on the official portal of the university. The process of selection encompasses the valid score in the entrance exam mandatory for the course at Avantika University. Here are the details of the same:
Application Process

Students are required to apply for admission on the official portal of Avantika University and fill in the details of registration. After completing the registration form, it is mandatory for students to attach required valid documents and the application fee.

BTech admission at Avantika University requires that students qualify in JEE main or state-level entrance exams. Design Scholarship Test is required for Bachelor of Design admission at Avantika University.It conducts the written entrance exam for admission in MBA, BCA, BBA, etc.
Avantika University releases the merit list of the students selected. Students applying for admission in any of the courses at Avantika University are required to qualify PI.
Counseling and Allocation of Seats
Selected students are required to personally come for document verification and pay the Avantika University fees for securing their seat.

courses_data.description: Avantika University offers a four-year BDes course spread across eight semesters. The university offers BDes in various specialisations such as Industrial Design, Transportation Design, Interior & Furniture Design, Information Design, etc. Admission to the BDes programme is based on DST, MIT-DAT, UCEED, NID-DAT or NIFT scores. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for the BDes course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BDes Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers admission to BDes programme based on the entrance exam scores of the candidate. The university considers scores in UCEED, MIT-DAT, NID-DAT or NIFT. Besides, Avantika University also conducts a Design Scholarship Test to shortlist candidates for BDes admission. Candidates selected based on entrance exam scores need to further pass the personal interview round for final admission.

faqs.question: Which are the various BDes specialisations offered by Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers four-year full-time BDes programme divided into eight semesters. The university offers BDes at the UG level to candidates who have completed their Class 12. Below are the BDes specialisations offered at Avantika University:Industrial DesignTransportation DesignInterior & Furniture DesignUser Experience DesignInformation DesignImmersive Media DesignInteraction Design, etc.

faqs.question: When can I apply for BDes admission at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University BDes application processhas begun for the academic year 2024. Candidates who want to take admission to the BDes programme in any of the affiliated colleges of Avantika University must apply online on the official website of the University.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BDes at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University BDes admissions 2024is a multi-stage process. Given below is the admission process for BDes programme offered at Avantika University:STEP 1: Visit Avantika University website and register for new admission by clicking on the 'Apply Now' tab. Candidates must provide personal, guardian, educational and other details in the registration form, upload the documents and pay the application fees.STEP 2: Appear for the Design Scholarship Test/ MIT Design Aptitude Test/ UCEED/ NID-DAT

courses_data.name: Avantika University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Avantika University offers a four-year, full-time BTech Computer Science and Engineering course in seven different specialisations. Some of these includeFull Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence,Cloud Computing, Interaction Design etc. The course is spread acorss eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination from a recognised Board with Physics, Mathematics and English as compulsory subjects with a minimum of 50% aggregate in and 50% marks in English can apply for the BTech course. Candidates must a valid rank and score in JEE Main or any other state entrance examination to get admission in the BTech course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Avantika University for BTech?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers admission to BTech course based on entrance exam scores of the candidate. The university considers scores in JEE Main, CUET or any other state-level entrance exams. The university also conducts Avantika Scholastic Test (AST) for BTech admission. Besides, candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to get a seat in the BTech programme.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers four-year BTech programme divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech in Computer Science Engineering at the UG level. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for any of the below BTech specialisations:Full Stack DevelopmentData ScienceArtificial IntelligenceCyber SecurityCloud ComputingUX Engineering

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 with Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry with at least 50% aggregate and 50% in English from a recognised board to apply for Avantika University BTech programme. Students must also be proficient in Engineering. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Can I join Avantika University Ujjain directly?
faqs.answer: Avantika University admissions are either based on entrance exam scores or performance of candidates in the Personal Inteview round. Any of the affiliated colleges or institutes of Avantika University does not offer direct admission in any of the programmes offered at the undergraduate or postgraduate level. The university considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, UCEED, etc. for admission to specific programme. Avantika University also conducts written test for some of the programmes such as BBA, MBA, BCA, etc.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Avantika University without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Avantika University considers JEE Main scores for admission to BTech programmes. However, it not compulsory to have a JEE Main score for admission. Aspirants with a valid score in CUET or any other state-level entrance exam can also get admission. Besides, the university also conducts AST or Avantika Scholastic Test for BTech admission.
