hostel_campus.college_name: Avantika University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities , average faculty, fees too high, excellent curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing! Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen with good food, big sports grounds and walking area. very spacious, big and very beautiful. With a lot of greenery and natural beauty. Hostel was beautiful with a good clinic, 24/7 WiFi, water, electricity.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avantika University.
reviews.review_text: The educational infrastructure is very good; the workshops, lab, computer lab and library are well-equipped with all the necessities. The hostel mess and canteen are also exceptionally good but equally expensive. The canteen is quite affordable. We do have a medical facility but it is very poor. Sports and games are also quite good, and the gym is very well-equipped. We've got table tennis, lawn tennis, basketball, volleyball, mini-football, and cricket grounds available too.

reviews.review_heading: Avantika university is one of the best the University.
reviews.review_text: University have beautiful, lushgreen campus. Infrastructure is awesome, hostel and mess are really nice. Internet (Wi-Fi/LAN ) is available 24*7. Library and classroom are spacious. Thus overall facilities and infrastructure avantika at Avantika are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Best University for Design and overall Development.
reviews.review_text:
24/7 Wi-Fi Service. Equipped Labs. Both Physical and Virtual library. Excellent facilities in the Hostels. Twin sharing rooms with attached bathrooms 
24/7 medical facilities. Food is highly nutritious. Non-veg strictly prohibited. Daily outings to Ujjain City and Indore outing once in a month. Sports - Football, Cricket, Table Tennis, Carrom, Chess, Badminton, etc are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Best Design College/ University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure @ Avantika University is good, The lush green campus is very much attractive, Legacy of Ujjain. Hostel and Mess are also good. 24/7 Internet (Wi-Fi/ LAN) available. Sports we used to play Cricket, Volley, Kabaddi. Access to classroom and Library is also 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Healthy environment and goo infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university campus is too notch with all the best facilities. Wi-Fi is available 24/7 both in classroom as well as in hostel. The Library is well-equipped with wide range of resources. From manual to digital it has vast range of collection. The only problem is that we have only one stationary and it gets really troublesome when all the students are in need of taking prints and all. The menu and taste of our cafeteria is really good and we have number of items to choose from. As of speaking ho...

reviews.review_heading: The ambience is pretty good, best college in Ujjain I would say.
reviews.review_text: The food at the mess is really fascinating and you can har the beverages over there. The hostel rooms are also good with 3 people in one room but there is a lot of space over there. The hostel room are completely equipped with 20mbps speed of Wi-Fi also.

reviews.review_heading: Avantika - Highly Disappointed
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is good. The students are attracted by the facilities and took admission. 
Wifi and labs are 4 Ratings 
Hostel facilities are also good . Earlier the food given by them was nice but now they are not giving that good. Below the expectations of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the friendly environment of the college.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about the available infrastructure, they provide free Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The quality of food is fabulous; I love it. They pre-plan the menu for the students according to their culture, ensuring equality so every student feels comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Wonderful campus with good style of teaching.
reviews.review_text:
Best Wi-Fi network and excellent infrastructure.
Quality of food is amazing, every weekend best snacks and cuisines food are offered to students as compared to other colleges. There is no non-veg food available. Every day after classes outing to Ujjain city is organized for 2 hours where students can explore city as well have their meals and other stuff.

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus with good faculties, but it can improve the placement cell qualities and the Mess.
reviews.review_text: The entire university is Wi-Fi enabled, including the classrooms and hostel. We have a computer lab. The decorum is well maintained. We have a library also in the Avantika University, which is also very good. I am a day scholar, I dont have a particular idea about the hostel and the hostel life, but the canteen, its good and its very affordable as well as a hygienic medical facility. Sports and games are being organised every month.

The scholarship schemes at the university include tuition fee waivers and stipends offered to meritorious, needy and deserving students. The scholarships at Avantika University not only favour the academically gifted but also support students from a sports background and students from economically backward families. The university offers tuition fee waivers of up to 100% and a maximum stipend of INR 12,000 per month.

college_info.college_name: Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025

highlights.summary: Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) admissions 2025 are open for various courses. Students can visit the official website and apply now through the online mode.

college_info.intro:
Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) popular programmes are BTech and MBA. Students opting for the integrated courses are taught propulsion, CAD modeling, computational fluid dynamics, aerodynamics, structures, flight mechanics, and avionics. AME course is a licensed-based programme and the students are taught about the aircraft and its several components.
Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) MBA students can work in Aircraft Insurance Companies and others. These students can become Programme Manager, Credit Control Manager, and Airline Contracting Manager, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) and their respective eligibility and Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) fee strutcure:

placements.overview: Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) offers 100% placement assistance to students. Students can work as Air hostess / Cabin Crew or can work in retail outlets, hostels, airline catering, fares and ticketing, and others.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) offers UG and PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Engineering and Management streams. At the UG level, the college offers a three-year BBA, 2,400 hrs, 3 years Aircraft Maintenance course, four-year AME with Aeronautical/ Aerospace Engineering, and others. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MBA courses to students. For the three-year Aircraft Maintenance course, out of 2400 hrs of total training, 1400 hrs is the theory part and the rest 1,000 hrs. are for the practical training. These 1,000 hrs are further divided as and 700 hrs. in-house with the college's own facilities. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) and their respective eligibility and Silver Oak College of Aviation Technology (SOCAT) fee structure:

review_content.Placements: As of now, the aviation college was started 2 years back, so no BBA, MBA, or B.Tech batch has completed for placement. And cabin crew students have been provided good placements. The companies are Indigo, SpiceJet, Air India, etc. Job and role is on the airport for ground staff, cabin crew, customer service, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. AC, projectors, tables are provided very well. Labs are systematically designed, and all parts of an aircraft are there for practicals. The best thing is that on campus, there is an A320 mock for practical and study purposes.

MBA students are taught subjects such as Strategic Operations Management, Business Communication for Managerial Competence, Professional Competencies and Carrier Development, Data Visualization and Analytics, and others. individual_reviews.course: MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Highly recommended for real life learnings.

content.Placements: 100% students were placed in my course. The highest package offered was 28 LPA and the lowest was 5 LPA. McKinsey, DHL, PSA Global are the top companies visiting. 100% students got internships in companies like Gati, APL Logistics, and Ecom Express. The top roles offered include that of logistics and operations manager.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, well built and maintained well by AUUP. The quality of the hostel was very good with proper cleaning services, but the quality of the canteen was not the best. There are a variety of canteens out of which you can choose one depending on your affordability.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college, Industry experience and expert faculty, Great placement, Amazing infrastructure.

content.Placements: Hi, I am from batch 2022-24 MBA (L&SCM). In my batch approximately 95% students were placed. If you are really serious about study and follow faculty guidelines, definitely you will get placed. The highest package was 28 LPA. If you talk about average package is approximately 8LPA and minimum was 4 LPA. Major recruiting companies are DHL, PSA Singapore, McKinsey and company, Transystem, Rhenus logistics, Kuehne Nagal, Flipkart, Ecomexpress. These are the mass recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was awesome. Library was open 24x7. College focuses on overall personality development. College also offers foreign languages to learn and many certifications like clean six sigma green belt, risk management, quality management and many more. Whole campus is wifi enabled. Digital attendance marking is done just by punching face. Many healthy food joints are available at campus. Campus has football, volleyball, cricket ground and many indoor games.

admission_process.title: CII School of Logistics, Amity University - Noida Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: CII School of Logistics, Amity Noida admissions 2026 are open. The college offers admission to full-time MBA programme, which is spread over two specialisations. CII School of Logistics admissions are entrance-based. The college accepts scores of national-level aptitude tests such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, etc. There are other selection rounds, including Extempore, Personal Interview, etc., are also conducted for the selection of right candidate. Moreover, students can apply online on the official website ofCII School of Logisticsfor their desired programme. Read on the article for more details around CII School of Logistics admission.

CII School of Logistics coursesare offered at the PG level in Management. Candidates are shortlisted based on their past academic merit and their performance in other selection rounds. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for CII School of Logistics course admissions:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
MBA (Logistics & Supply Chain Management)
Graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate
CAT/ MAT/GMAT
MBA (Supply Chain Analytics & Management)
Graduation with a minimum of 60% aggregate
CAT/MAT/GMAT/XAT/NMAT/CMAT+ PI + Extempore + English Language Test

CII Noida conducts multi-step selection process to admit right candidates. Admissions begin with an online application process and proceed with other selection rounds. Check below the step-wise CII Noida admission process:
Step 1: CII Noida Application Process 2026

To get the application login credentials, candidates will have to submit the registration fee of INR 1,500 through the official website of CII Noida. Candidates need to apply online on the official website of the university.
Step 2: CII Noida Selection Process 2026

CII School of Logistics, Noida admissions aredone on the basis of an entrance examination, including CAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ XAT/ NMAT/ CMAT score. The final selection process includes thepercentage achieved in graduation, extempore, personal interview round and an english language test.
Step 3: CII Noida Counselling & Admission Confirmation
After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended for real life learnings.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, well built and maintained well by AUUP. The quality of the hostel was very good with proper cleaning services, but the quality of the canteen was not the best. There are a variety of canteens out of which you can choose one depending on your affordability.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college, Industry experience and expert faculty, Great placement, Amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was awesome. Library was open 24x7. College focuses on overall personality development. College also offers foreign languages to learn and many certifications like clean six sigma green belt, risk management, quality management and many more. Whole campus is wifi enabled. Digital attendance marking is done just by punching face. Many healthy food joints are available at campus. Campus has football, volleyball, cricket ground and many indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Average institute/university.
reviews.review_text: Every type of facility is available. Class was fully air conditioned and with Wi-Fi, with enough seats and every class has projector and screens, microphone etc. 24*7 electricity is available. In terms of infrastructure, you should carefully trust Amity.

reviews.review_heading: Really happy I got a chance to learn from such esteemed professors.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well maintained and has all the needed equipment. The department has all the equipment that are needed for day to day life. They even adapted to online teaching very easily. There is hostel facility available in Amity Noida.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Supply Chain Management branch in CII School Of Logistics.
reviews.review_text: The lowest salary package offered is 6LPA. Recruiting companies are HUL, McKinsey, FSC,  3SC, ECom Express, etc. Every student got internship at respectful firms. Our course helped us to understand the basic supply chain, strategies formation, analytics and analysis.

reviews.review_heading: This college is high on learning and fun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and administrative facilities are of global standards. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled with air conditioning. Smart classrooms and laboratories as also a state-of-the-art libraries i.e physical and virtual. Offline, online, and hybrid are capable at zero notice. The campus houses top franchises i.e H block and brands to cater to students' culinary aspirations. Every faculty member is lavishly equipped with conference and lecture halls, auditoriums, cafeteria, staff rooms, syndicat...

reviews.review_heading: Instead of CII school, it is better to choose a general MBA in Amity.
reviews.review_text: In general, in Amity, campus life is very good, including classrooms, library and canteen. Sports, games and drama are good. I did not join hostels which are limited in number and not allowed for locals.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Amity University, Noida, is very good and better. Students get attracted when they visit Amity University Noida. All the facilities are available on the campus like Dominos, Subway, Cafe Coffee Day, Amul, Bikano, Mamma Mia and Wall of Street.

reviews.review_heading: Pricey college, fantastic infrastructure but with disappointing placements and value for money.
reviews.review_text: This college is best known for its infrastructure. The buildings are well maintained and extremely well built. The campus is spacious and has about 15 blocks. The auditorium and the food court are also lavishly built with a cozy ambience. The campus is also tech savvy with fast elevators and a high-speed Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and the overall experience there is amazing.
reviews.review_text: Amity University offers e-learning studio for its students. Many countries have contacts with Amity University. It has 300 syndicate rooms and approximately 450 classrooms which help in the overall development of students as well in achieving their future goals.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommend. Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, placement, facilities and all.
reviews.review_text: We had access to excellent facilities. We had well-equipped computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi which was super helpful for our programming and practical sessioms. The classrooms were specious and had all the necessary equipment for a comfortable learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college and teachers.
reviews.review_text:
1. There were brilliant facilities provided in our college than compared to other colleges we have access to super fast Wi-Fi for 24/7 hostels are fully equipped with Wi-Fi and classrooms have smart learnings in them library is also huge and good. 
2. Quality of hostels is excellent they provide very good food in their canteens with pure hygiene and has excellent medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University is a small Nation in itself.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fine. We have a big library with all the required books related to many fields. There are 4 canteens, dominos, subway, CCD inside the campus. The sports complex is also fine. It could have been better as there is only a single ground for the rocket, football, and athletics.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I personally like the management; they are with the students all the time.

review_content.Placements: Basically, our college does not provide any placements. They just teach and complete the syllabus. Actually, the students must try on their own in order to get a job; there will be no involvement of the management in the job placements. The pass percentage in my batch was 90%. Each of my friends and I have completed our MBA in regular and are very thankful to the management. Now, as ASBM students, we are placed in different positions in different companies, thanks to the management once again.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has excellent infrastructure, including a computer lab with around 50 computers and good toilets for the students to use. The atmosphere at the college is awesome, with lots of greenery and plants that give off good vibes. I mostly like the area in which the college is located.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Really it is a good college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: You have to get at least a rank of 20,000 in the ICET to get admission in this college. It is also very good college for MBA in finance, HR and marketing. Cognizant, Optum and many other companies will visit here and hire students. This college provides a very good opportunity compared to other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is available all the time. Labs are very good compared to other colleges, and the classrooms are also huge. But there is no library, but we can study in other empty classrooms. Students also have fun activities in our college.

college_info.intro: The flagship programme offered at MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training is an MBA. The institute provides this programme to students at the PG level. faqs.answer: MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training, also known as MMM IMERT, is a private institute located in Pune, Maharashtra. It is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University (UNIPUNE). IMERT was established in 1994 and is approved by the All-India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. The institute has been accredited by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) with an A+ grade.IMERT offers a full-time MBA course with a duration of two years at the postgraduate level. IMERT course admission is completely entrance-based. MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training fees for the MBA programme are approximately INR 1.2 lakh. Some of the MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training placement partners are Federal Bank, EY, KPMG, South Indian Bank, Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Berger Paints, etc.

faqs.answer: MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training offers PG degree and doctorate programmes in the stream of Management. The college provides practical exposure to its students through various industrial visits conducted at national and international level. The college offers MBA at PG level. It also offers PhD programme. Candidates can visit the official website of MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training to apply online. To be eligible for admission, candidates must fullfill the criteria set by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best institutes for MBA in Pune.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of students get placed through college placement. The highest package is 12 LPA, the average is 5 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are UBS Bank, ICICI Prudential, Bajaj Finserv, Persistent, etc. Around 90% of students got internships. Top roles offered are relationship manager, marketing manager, financial analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All the required facilities are available on campus, like Wi-Fi, hi-tech labs, a language lab, a library, a play group, and smart boards in each classroom. Hostels are also available on the campus. There are two canteens available, one is a cafe and the other is for a full meal. We have anytime access to the computer lab for practice and other skill development.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024

content.Placements: The percentage of students getting placed in our college was not that great. It was okay. The average package for students getting placed in our college was 5 LPA. The college also provided students with internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the course were available to us in the college included access to Wi-Fi, and classrooms were big and airy. The quality of facilities and the food in the hostel was very nice, though somewhat okay.

admission_process.title: MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training admission 2025 is ongoing. The college offers degree and doctorate programmes in the stream of Management. MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training offers an MBA at the PG level. It also offers a PhD programme. Admission to the courses is entrance-based. The college is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University (UNIPUNE) and follows its admission norms. After completing the admission criteria, candidates can apply online through the official college website. Read the below article for more details about MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training admission, along with course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training admission to all the courses is entrance-based. Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for the respective course. The college offers admission to MBA based on various entrance exam scores, such as CMAT/ CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ ATMA and others. The table below lists MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training courses eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduation with a 50% aggregate
MAH MBA CET/ CMAT/CAT/ MAT/XAT/ ATMA
Note:The MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training also offers a PhD.

MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training admission is open for PG and doctoral courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all its courses. The college carries out its application process on the official website. To apply for admission to any course, candidates are required to follow multiple steps. Check below theMMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Trainingadmission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025
Candidates looking for admission to MMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training in PG and PhD courses are required to apply on the official website of the college.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission. If candidates want admission to PG courses, candidates must be required to pass a graduation degree, and for PhD courses, candidates must pass a master's degree from a recognised board. After filling out the eligibility, candidates need to appear for the entrance exam, i.e. MAH MBA CET/CMAT/ CAT/MAT/ XAT/ATMA, followed by a counselling round accepted by the college for admission.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment

Candidates, after filling out the eligibility and clearing the selection rounds, i.e., entrance exam and counselling rounds, are required to pay a certain amount ofMMM's Institute of Management Education Research and Training feeto lock their final seats.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best institutes for MBA in Pune.
reviews.review_text: All the required facilities are available on campus, like Wi-Fi, hi-tech labs, a language lab, a library, a play group, and smart boards in each classroom. Hostels are also available on the campus. There are two canteens available, one is a cafe and the other is for a full meal. We have anytime access to the computer lab for practice and other skill development.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are not that good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the course were available to us in the college included access to Wi-Fi, and classrooms were big and airy. The quality of facilities and the food in the hostel was very nice, though somewhat okay.

reviews.review_heading: My experience about my college IMERT.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure and management. We can find all the major facilities there. The staff is good and well educated. There are three buildings for three courses so that's there's no disturbance to each other. It has a prime location in the heart of Pune city. It's very convenient to travel from Pune railway station and bus stand.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and facilities, good faculty and placements
reviews.review_text: The facilities that the college provided were excellent. When I was studying at that time the whole infrastructure got changed and renovated. Now it looks like we have not visited a college but a corporate company instead. My college has Wi-Fi, a separate computer lab for online exams and Excel training. We do have sports and games. The food quality in the canteen is also good.

The best college for practical knowledge, to explore your skills and to learn new skills, good faculty is provided, best mentor, all needed facilities have been provided, outbound inbound trainings, financial and marketing tours, good campus and best jobs are provided to students. Almost best learning experience in this college. The best college for practical knowledge, to explore your skills and to learn new skills, good faculty is provided, best mentor, all needed facilities have been provided, outbound inbound trainings, financial and marketing tours, good campus and best jobs are provided to students. Almost best learning experience in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's an average college.
reviews.review_text:
There is high-speed Wi-Fi on the whole campus, good multipurpose lab with high technology systems, etc.
The classrooms are clean and clear with good benches and a projector. The medical facility is not so good. There are no sports facilities and game zones available. 
The quality of food is good but the canteen is not very clean.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: There are two hostels in the college, and they are the best, but old. The food offered is contractual, and it changes with the change of management of the hostel. We will get good food. Indore is one of the best foodie places in India, so we love the facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 1,20,000 to 3,00,000.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students were placed in my course. During that time, the one package is Rs. 20,000 per semester. Top recruiters are Wipro, TCS, Deloitte, etc. 70% of students received internships at MNCs through my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-maintained, spacious, and equipped with projectors and smart boards to support learning. The hostel facilities are decent, with separate buildings for boys and girls. Rooms are available in both single and shared options depending on the year of study. Cleanliness is maintained regularly, and basic amenities like laundry, water purifiers, and 24/7 electricity are provided.

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available for various courses offered at ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in Engineering/ Technology with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to SC/ ST category) in appropriate branch of Engineering/ Technology. Final year candidate can also apply on provisional basis. Those candidate who have completed graduation with 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to SC/ ST category) and must have studied mathematics as a subject in 12th can also apply to this course.MCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree. OR Candidate must have passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level (with additional bridge Courses as per the norms of the concerned University). Candidate must have secured above mentioned marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category).MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree or equivalent in the relevant field of engineering and technology with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.

review_summary.college_name: ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is excellent for the students who wants to explore their career in here.

content.Placements: In my college 79 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package given by the company is 15 LPA. The lowest package given by the company is 5 LPA and the average package is 9 LPA. Companies like Tech Mahindra and Oracle visit our course. There are 85 percent of students who get internships in our course in companies like Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facilities in our college are excellent. Labs are good and the teachers in the labs are so supportive. Smart classrooms are there so that a student should understand what the professor is reading. Hostel are near by the college and the hostel food is so good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is good, with supportive faculty members, great placements, & a good environment.

content.Placements: There are 80% of students admitted to our department. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest package is 5 LPA, and the average package is between 6 and 8 LPA. TCS and Wipro are the top companies that visit our college. 75% of students get internships at companies like TCS and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is the best part that I enjoy. Labs are good. Classrooms are big, and AC is fitted in the classrooms. Hostel food is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, highly qualified, and their knowledge is top-notch. They teach using projectors so that students understand easily. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. According to students, the semester examinations are not that hard, and a student can pass easily. Teachers are comfortable with students and are supportive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college has a well-maintained infrastructure.

content.Placements: 40% of students were placed in my course. During that time, the one package is Rs. 20,000 per semester. Top recruiters are Wipro, TCS, Deloitte, etc. 70% of students received internships at MNCs through my course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-maintained, spacious, and equipped with projectors and smart boards to support learning. The hostel facilities are decent, with separate buildings for boys and girls. Rooms are available in both single and shared options depending on the year of study. Cleanliness is maintained regularly, and basic amenities like laundry, water purifiers, and 24/7 electricity are provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Placements at Ajay Binay Institute of Technology are moderately good. Most of the students get placed in many different companies every year. They get a very good salary also. The highest salary for placement is 8 LPA. Many students and seniors get placed this year.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility at Ajay Binay Institute of Technology is not so good. The rooms of the hostels are good but mess food is not so good. They charge Rs 50,000 per year for hotel charges. The quality of hostel food is not so good. You can also choose mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is worth it here.

content.Placements: Our course ECE has very high placement rates combining both the placements from the EE and CSE side. It has recently become autonomous from 2025-26. Wipro, Micromax, Infosys, Reliance Jio, and Tech Mahindra are some top recruiters. There are 100% Internships from Accenture, TCS, Infosys, etc. Roles offered are researcher, web developer, data analyst, power System engineering, and mechatronics engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are well-maintained. The hostel facility is very cool and hygienic. Annual sports and function named Ignition is organised every year in February. It has sports like chess, badminton, volleyball and cricket.

hostel.description: There are separate hostels for boys & girls. All the hostels have good quality food & a hygienic dining hall. It has all the amenities of comfort & safety. The hostellers enjoy ragging free environment, reading facility & a T.V room.

library.description: Institute central library has a rich collection of academic books, reference manuals, journals, periodicals. It caters to the entire demand of students, faculty members & Staff .The library has facilities like CDROM, photocopiers for students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground

reviews.review_heading: My college is excellent for the students who wants to explore their career in here.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facilities in our college are excellent. Labs are good and the teachers in the labs are so supportive. Smart classrooms are there so that a student should understand what the professor is reading. Hostel are near by the college and the hostel food is so good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good, with supportive faculty members, great placements, & a good environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is the best part that I enjoy. Labs are good. Classrooms are big, and AC is fitted in the classrooms. Hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a well-maintained infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-maintained, spacious, and equipped with projectors and smart boards to support learning. The hostel facilities are decent, with separate buildings for boys and girls. Rooms are available in both single and shared options depending on the year of study. Cleanliness is maintained regularly, and basic amenities like laundry, water purifiers, and 24/7 electricity are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ABIT - Ajay Binay Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility at Ajay Binay Institute of Technology is not so good. The rooms of the hostels are good but mess food is not so good. They charge Rs 50,000 per year for hotel charges. The quality of hostel food is not so good. You can also choose mess.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is worth it here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are well-maintained. The hostel facility is very cool and hygienic. Annual sports and function named Ignition is organised every year in February. It has sports like chess, badminton, volleyball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best than that of other college .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection in every classrooms, labs are very clean and all type of equipment are available, class room are very big and projectors are available in every class and smart class room, library every type of study book you can find, hostel are few distance from college good quality of food available in the mess and canteen and medical facility and sports every thing is good .

reviews.review_heading: Very good experience at ABIT and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, labs, and classrooms are fully maintained. Hostel food quality is not so good. There are 3 times nonveg food in a week. Experienced lab teachers and classrooms with projectors are there. Very good facilities are available in the college. Many books are available in the college library.

reviews.review_heading: Increases your education to step forward.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and lectures are quite better. Department has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and smart classes. Hostel rooms are pretty good and well-maintained with an air conditioning system and enough space. The quality of food is good and made personally in the presence of the charge. Mess canteen is maintained well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is one of the worthy colleges in our area.
reviews.review_text: This college is one of the oldest colleges, so its infrastructure might be a little old, but it has numerous facilities such as a good laboratory, a well-cleaned digital classroom, and its environment is very calm. The college premises are very clean and neat.

reviews.review_heading: Education is the best investment, invest wisely.
reviews.review_text: The library is well equipped with books for the entire course and there are also extra books for those who crave more. There is no wi-fi facility. Classrooms are very neat and clean. All other facilities, including the canteen, mess, and medical facilities, are above par. Sports and games are not encouraged that much.

reviews.review_heading: (A. B. I. T ) My college review .
reviews.review_text: Our college building quality is excellent. It should be maintained. For different branches, different buildings are situated. All the buildings have smart classrooms, a big library, AC-connected labs and Wi-Fi. The hostel is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: We have smart classrooms and a good lab.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our department has 4 labs. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Our classrooms are good. Our college has a library. The hostel facilities are good. They serve both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items.

reviews.review_heading: My experience & thoughts about ABIT.
reviews.review_text: College campus is very neat and clean and most importantly very well organized as well. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. You can access it anywhere in the campus. Department labs are also well-equipped with all the machineries and components.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a good atmosphere for studying and excellent opportunities.
reviews.review_text: We have a total of 4 labs with a good number of systems and all the software installed in them. Wi-Fi is free on campus for all students as well as faculty members. There are smart classrooms in which students are able to study through projectors. In the library, all the books are available. Even magazines and daily newspapers are available. The hostel atmosphere is also good. Medical facilities are available on the premises.

table.details: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology

college_info.intro: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology's popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The institute offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Biomedical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is a two-year programme. The institute offered an MBA specialisation in General Management. individual_reviews.course: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent for learning if you adjust, though the hostel mess is poor, and some faculty are difficult

content.Placements: For my department, placement is going great so far. Almost 80 percent have got an offer, but can't say for sure about other departments. For my department personnel, HOD is trying really hard for all of us and also for junior but I have seen some department members neglecting their duty as well. So please be careful when choosing.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, with enough facilities to learn and explore if you have the motivation to use them properly. The campus environment supports growth, but personal effort matters the most. Hostel facilities have improved recently with the construction of a new hostel, making living conditions more comfortable and manageable. The mess, however, is disappointing. There are three food options, the first two, meant for South Indian and international students, are repetitive and lack quality. The third option, intercontinental food, offers a better variety and taste and is clearly the only good choice.

The hostel and food quality are excellent. Medical facilities, sports, and games receive extra care. The mess and canteen are hygienic.

admission_overview.college_name: KPR College Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: KPRIET Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KPRIET admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The institute considers scores in TANCET, CEETA PG or GATE for admission to specific PG courses. For BE/ BTech programmes, aspirants are selected based on Class 12 score followed by TNEA Counselling.KPRIEToffers courses at UG and PG levels in Engineering and Management streams. The institute offers courses in affiliation withAnna University. Interested candidates can apply online for admission.

KPRIET offers admission to UG courses based on merit whereas, entrance exam scores are considered for PG programmes. The institute considers TANCET, CEETA PG and GATE scores for admission to PG programmes. Below areKPRIET coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
KPRIET admissions are currently open. Candidates are offered seats in the institute based on their entrance or qualifying exam score. Below is the KPRIET admission process in detail:
Step 1: KPRIET Application Process 2025

Candidates with a Class 12 score need to apply for TNEA Counselling for BE/ BTech programmes. For all other courses, aspirants need to fill out the enquiry form available on the institute's website. Aspirants before applying must first register for the accepted entrance exam.
Step 2: Selection
KPRIET selects candidates for BE/ BTech programmes based on Class 12 scores. The institute accepts TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG for MBA and ME programmes, respectively.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Candidates seeking admission in BE/ BTech courses are offered seats via TNEA Counselling. For all other programmes, candidates need to provide their entrance exam scores and report at the campus for document verification. Selected aspirants need to pay theKPRIET feeto confirm their seat in the institute.

courses_data.description: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a four-year full-time BE/ BTech course divided into eight semesters. The institute offers BE inCivil, Mechanical, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, etc. BTech programme is available in Chemical Engineering,Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Information Technology, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics are eligible to apply for BE/ BTech programme. The institute also offers lateral entry to BE/ BTech course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ SCA/ ST/ MBC & DNC/ Backward Class including Backward Class Muslims) to apply for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology BE/ BTech course. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Does KPRIET offer lateral entry in BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers lateral entry to BTech course. Aspirants must pass Diploma examination with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category) in any branch of Engineering and Technology to apply for KPRIET BTech (lateral entry) course.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology admission?
faqs.answer: KPRIET’s application closing dates differ based on the admission mode and course being applied for. Still, some general rules can be deduced from previous years’ trends;The following are examples of closing dates for the different forms of B.Tech admissions:- TNEA (Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions) counseling: This normally takes place between approximately July 15th and July 30th.- Management quota: Nearly always occurs between August 15th and August 31st.While M.Tech applications generally cl

courses_data.name: KPRIET MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: KPRIET offers a two-year full-time MBA programme divided into four semesters through KPR Business School. The course is offered at the PG level. Admission to the MBA is based on TANCET score. Besides, candidates must also complete their graduation in any discipline to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: Yes, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a two-year full-time MBA programme spread across four semesters through KPR Business School. The course is offered at the PG level. The selection to the MBA is based on TANCET score.

faqs.question: Is TANCET accepted for MBA at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: Yes, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology considers TANCET scores for MBA admission. Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test or TANCET, is an admission test conducted in offline mode. Anna University conducts the state-level entrance once in a year. Candidates are offered seat in KPRIET based on their TANCET rank.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is up to 963. Good thing to know is that KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

faqs.question: What is the GATE cutoff for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology 2024?
faqs.answer: I could not find the cutoff for GATE for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, or KPRIT specifically, 2024. Cutoffs for GATE vary with specialization, category, etc. Speaking in general terms, institute-specific GATE cutoffs for institutes like KPRIT would be on an ad-hoc basis (like the number of seats open, demand among students etc); GATE performance in general. The best source for information concerning the GATE cutoff would be speaking with the admissions office or researching furthe

courses_data.name: KPRIET ME Admission 2025
courses_data.description: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a two-year full-time ME course. The institute offers ME in Computer Science and Engineering,VLSI Design, Structural Engineering andCAD/ CAM. Admission to the ME programme is based on CEETA PG or GATE score. Aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements for admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for ME at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to complete a bachelor's degree or equivalent in the relevant field and obtained at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate in the case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying degree examination to apply for KPRIET ME programme. Below are the degree required:B.E. / BTech/ B.Arch. Degree Programmes (or)B.Pharm. Degree Programmes (or)Master's Degree in the relevant branch of Science / Arts, which are prescribedAspirants who have completed Class 12 with AMIE or Cla

faqs.question: What are the M.E specialisations offered at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a two-year full-time ME programme at the PG level. The institute offers ME to candidates who have completed their graduation. Below are the offered ME specialisations:Computer Science and EngineeringVLSI DesignStructural EngineeringCAD/ CAM

faqs.question: How much does M.Tech at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology cost?
faqs.answer: The fee structure for the B.Tech programme at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is as of 2023 may be the  yearly fee for the B.Tech programme is around INR 97k. and The total fee for the entire duration of the programme ranges from INR 50k to INR 2,00,000 per annum and hostel accomedation fees are counted seperately yearly, Do contact the institute as the fee structure may vary.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology admission?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for the KPRIET is different for TNEA and for management quota admission. Generally, the TNEA counseling admissions get completed in September itself but the admission through management quota is generally done on first come first served basis and such quota admissions can go on till the intake is complete. It One should always vosit the institute for duration details or visiting the website of the particular institute.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions are currently open. Candidates need to register for TNEA for BE/ BTech admission. For PG, aspirants must first apply for accepted entrance exam and then at the official website of the institute for admission. Admission to KPRIET courses is both merit and entrance-based.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at KPRIET without appearing in any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology offers admission to UG courses based on Class 12 score of the candidates. Hence, aspirants applying for BE/ BTech does not require qualifying any entrance exam. For all other courses, entrance exam is required for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: KPR Institute of Technology admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The institute selects candidates for BE/ BTech programmes based on Class 12 scores. The institute accepts TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG for MBA and ME programmes, respectively. After completion of the selection process, aspirants need to participate in counselling and document verification round.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at KPRIET?
faqs.answer: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology does not offer direct admission. Candidates shortlists candidates for UG courses i.e. BE/ BTech based on Class 12 score followed by TNEA Counselling. Besides, admission to MBA and ME courses is based on TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG, respectively. Once selected, aspirants need to participate in counselling and document verification round.

placement_data.title: KPRIET Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The 2024 batch comprised 1,002 students. Out of these, 807 students were interested during the 2024 recruitment drives and 743 students were placed . The highest package offered during the KPRIET placements 2024 was INR 54 LPA . The average package stood at INR 5.20 LPA and the median package offered was INR 4 LPA . The overall placement percentage for 2024 was 93% .

The institute has a Placement Cell that organises Career Guidance and Career Support Programs and trains the students on communication skills and personality development. Alongside this, Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning and Verbal Reasoning through Corporate Trainers, Industry Experts and In-House Trainers were also provided to prepare the students for real-world challenges.

faqs.question: How to prepare for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology placement drive?
faqs.answer: Most of the companies start the placement process with a pre-placement talk that describes the job profile, the company's vision and the services provided by them. Students are advised to attend the PPT for the desired company as it is the base step of preparation for that particular company. Thereafter, prepare a decent resume highlighting your skills, academic background, and extra-curricular details. The most important step of the placement interview is the test conducted by the interviewer. Students should well prepare the Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, and Quantitative Awareness topics. Alongside this, prepare the basics of the core subject, depending upon the branch they are studying in. To excel in the GD round, try to initiate first and listen carefully to the point put forward by the other members.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent for learning if you adjust, though the hostel mess is poor, and some faculty are difficult
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with enough facilities to learn and explore if you have the motivation to use them properly. The campus environment supports growth, but personal effort matters the most. Hostel facilities have improved recently with the construction of a new hostel, making living conditions more comfortable and manageable. The mess, however, is disappointing. There are three food options, the first two, meant for South Indian and international students, are repetitive and lac...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty, placements, and infrastructure with facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is very good in my college, and we have AC labs and high-tech infrastructure. The classrooms are also high-tech, providing a peaceful study. The hostel and food quality are excellent. Medical facilities, sports, and games receive extra care. The mess and canteen are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is one of the best infrastructure college in Coimbatore. This college has good hostel facilities. Hostel foods are very hygienic and healthy. Multiple sports grounds facilities are available in this college. More laboratories and library facilities are available in this college. More comfortable and spacious classrooms are available in this college. Wi-Fi network and CCTV camera facilities are also here this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: This college has good infrastructure and is well-known as a green campus. It also has a good Wi-Fi facility overall on the campus. Every department has its own library, other than that of the central library. The campus is very neat and clean in it.

reviews.review_heading: KPR is the best choice. All facilities that you need to outshine as an engineer are a single roof.
reviews.review_text: Upgraded labs. All kinds of facilities in a single place. Hostels are very good, surrounded by the natural environment that makes it more admirable and feels like home. The hostel provides full safety and support.

reviews.review_heading: Review about KPRIET, Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the college are very good, and the infrastructure is very good in the college. The environment for learning is very good, and student engagement in many activities other than studies is also encouraged. Additionally, the hostel is very protective and safe for students.

reviews.review_heading: KPR - Top placements and growth.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like Wi-Fi 24/7 are there. Many labs are available and all are fully equipped. They can be used by students anytime after college. Each classroom has a projector and most of the professors use it and each class has an outer. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It has neat and clean rooms. Food is good moreover safety is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college ever in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many facilities like a Wi-Fi connection. Hostellers use labs up to 7 PM and also use a library. NCC and NSS are available in our college. Many more facilities like kho-kho courts, kabaddi courts, a fitness center for men and women, chess, carrom, ludo, etc., are available. Many indoor and outdoor games are available for the students on the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: KPRIET - You can get everything that you expect in your college life.
reviews.review_text: Here, students will get access to Wi-Fi for studying purposes and only digital classrooms. The library here is okay compared to other colleges. Here, students who come in the sports quota can get full guidance and support, and not only sports quota students, everybody can use it. The hostel is slightly strict for girls. Mess food is being prepared by maintaining proper hygiene, and the taste will be okay. Small issues like fever, cough will be treated in college by the medical room, and severe i...

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is really a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology and the campus surroundings are very beautiful. The college has spacious classrooms and well-equipped library facilities. There are also hi-tech laboratories available. The hostel facilities are nice, and the food in the hostel and canteen is hygienic. Sports ground facilities are also provided at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Really an underrated college and is going to be one of the top colleges in my city .
reviews.review_text: The labs and lab facilities of our college are top-notch with high-performance systems. Students are provided with free Wi-Fi with very strong coverage and speed. The library is huge, with 2 floors of continuing books of all genres, both fictional and nonfiction. There are also computers inside the library if you need to access e-books. Hostel dorms are very well maintained with frequent cleaning, and the restrooms are well cleaned and maintained. The hygienic side is that the rooms are top-notc...

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute: Industry-Ready Education with Room for Growth.
reviews.review_text: At KPR Institute, the Civil Engineering department offers top-notch facilities like sponsored labs by L&T, modern classrooms, a well-stocked library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostel amenities are comfortable, the mess serves nutritious meals, medical facilities are accessible, and sports activities are encouraged for a balanced student life.

reviews.review_heading: Happy KPR—the happiest KPR, always KPR.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library and internet facilities. Courses offered include Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, and Chemical Engineering.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review about KPR.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very nice. College campus is always green in nature. Hostel infrastructure is also nice. They maintain separate hostels for both boys and girls with veg and non-veg canteen based on students. They celebrate hostel day with full of events for one week with DJ.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent compared to other colleges in Coimbatore. Wi-Fi is unlimited for your laptop, but you cannot connect Wi-Fi on your mobile. All the classrooms are smart classrooms with projectors. L&T Experience Engineering Lab is also available, established with an amount of about 1 crore. Coming to the hostel, the food is average, and the restrooms are good. You will have all the facilities for sports and games.

highlights.summary:

college_info.intro: Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal offers courses including BTech and MBA as popular programmes for durations varying from 2 years to 4 years in full-time mode. The university offers these courses on the basis of merit and valid scores in the accepted entrance examination. Therefore, candidates are required to secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation to qualify for the respective course of choice. Graphic Era Bhimtal fee structure includes a tuition fee ranging from INR 3.3 Lakh to INR 16.4 Lakh. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of a minimum aggregate of 50% to 60% in Class 12. In addition to this, candidates have to secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, CUET, CAT, and other equivalent examinations.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal extends a wide range of programmes to students at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The university is mainly concerned with the streams of engineering, law, management, computer applications, humanities, applied sciences, animation, fashion designing, journalism, and mass communication, agriculture, etc. with the university offering BTech, BCom, BSc, BCA, etc. courses at the UG level. While at the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA, MCA, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Students who are enrolled in one of the Graphic Era Bhimtal BBA courses and wish to reside in hostels must pay hostel fees. This fee is charged on an annual basis. For a three-year course duration, the fees amount to INR 5.6 lakh. Students must note that this fee information is taken from official sources. However, it is subject to change.
faqs.question: How much is the hostel fees for Graphic Era Bhimtal BBA students?

faqs.answer: A:    For BBA all interested candidates should have passed Class XII from a recognised board of examination in any stream with not less than 50% marks.For BCA  Pass in the Plus two examination or equivalent of any recognised board in India with 50% marks in all streams, with Basic Mathematics (up to 10th standard).For BTECH all interested candidates should have passed Class XII from a recognised board of examination with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry . Candidates who have successfully cleared JEE Mains will also be considered for admission on the basis of thier JEE Mains scores based on the cut off.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by GEHU Bhimtal for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    No, You cannot join GEHU, Bhimtal Directly. Students who have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects are considered eligible to join B.Tech. course.Candidates are admitted to the UG courses through GEJET (Graphic Era Joint Entrance Test) conducted by the University.JEE Main and GEJET scores are used to determine admission to B.Tech programs.Students can enroll in the M.Tech programme if they have completed their BE or B.Tech in any discipline. Candidates are chosen for admission to the M.Tech programme based on their GATE score, which must be valid.To apply for a Ph.D., a candidate must have completed a post-graduate degree in a relevant field. NET, SLET, and GATE are the criteria for admission to the Ph.D. program. Written exams and interviews are then  conducted.Applicants may apply Offline or Online in both types.In order to be eligible for admission to the BSc, B.Com, BCA, and BBA programs, candidates must have earned at least 50% marks in their 10+2 programme in any discipline.
faqs.question: Can I join GEHU Bhimtal directly?

faqs.answer: A:      Yes, you can get into the GEHU Bhimtal MBA programme with 70% in the 12th grade. The admission procedure at GEU is merit based. You can get a direct entry if you score above 50% in 12th class.  The minimum eligibility requirement for admission to BSc, B.Com, BCA, and BBA course is candidates must have completed 10+2 in any discipline with at least 50%.  The scholarship bracket availed by the candidate at the time of the admission is frozen for the entire duration of the course. The candidate will have to score a minimum aggregate of 70%, in order for the scholarship to applied in each semester

reviews_list.review_title: The college location is great and helps to keep calm and focused, but it is more crowded than needed

review_content.Placements: At Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal, not more than 10-15 students are placed on average, which is very low compared to other universities. This year, the highest package is 47 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA, which will make a huge impact on the average package.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, but not good enough to make students happy. Students can only adjust to those facilities but not be happy about them, and they can't even do anything about it. The food in the mess was the worst part, but it has improved after some improvements.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the beauty and the placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 45% students are placed in my college. The highest package is 70 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The top companies are Amazon, Accenture, Google, Atlassian, Microsoft, Apple, etc. Around 70% students get internship. The top roles of the students are AI Software Engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are quite good and the infrastructure is also very good for all the courses, for example, Wi-Fi works well, labs and classrooms are cleaned every time by workers, and are in good condition. Library also has many seats and a good librarian. Hostels are also in a very good state and are very clean, including a good food facility.

course_faqs.question: How much is the tuition fees for pursuing BCom at Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal?
course_faqs.answer: Once the Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal BCom merit list is released, students are required to pay the first installment of the tuition fees. As per the fee structure, the total tuition fee to pursue a BCom course ranges from INR 4.29 to INR 4.82 lakh.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

course_faqs.question: Are BCom students offered any scholarships at Graphic Era Bhimtal?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, BCom students studying at Graphic Era Bhimtal are offered multiple scholarships. The university offers various types of scholarships to cater to different student needs. Listed below are some of the scholarships available for students to avail:Fee Concession For Wards Of Defence PersonnelLoyalty ConcessionSibling ConcessionAcademic ScholarshipFee Concession For Female Candidates

course_faqs.question: What modes are offered by Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal for payment of BCom fees?
course_faqs.answer: Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal provides various modes of payment to students who wish to pay BCom fees. One of the easiest modes is online. In this mode, students can pay the fees from the convenience of their homes. They get various options, such as net banking, debit card, UPI, etc. The other way is to produce a demand draft of the required fees and submit it at the concerned office in person.

overview_faqs.question: What is the duration of BCom at Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal?
overview_faqs.answer: Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal BCom courses run for a duration ranging from three to four years. This is because the university offers BCom Hons courses with a duration of four years. However, students are provided the option to exit the course after completion of three years. Those who exit after three years get a BCom degree.

overview_faqs.answer: Excellent academic, campus and hostel facilities makes GEHU a first choice among students. It is one of the fastest growing universities in Uttarakhand.It has a good reputation for its academic programs, faculty, and infrastructureIt's good and good companies come with great salary packages. review_summary.college_name: Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal.

content.Placements: The lowest package offered in our course from our college is 3 LPA. The highest package offered is 7 LPA. Many companies recruit students from our course in our college. Almost all students got internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities are provided by our college, like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, medical facilities, games, etc. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-designed. The hostel building is also neat, clean, and well-designed. The food quality available in the mess and canteen is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: 2025 is good compared to 2015.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed from our course. The highest package is of 67 LPA, and the average package is of 6 LPA-7 LPA, while the minimum package is of 2 LPA-3 LPA in our college. About 30% of students got internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are good on our campus. All the things are well settled and are working. All the students are provided with a computer to do their practical tasks in the college, while students have the freedom to play our game, which we play well, or to fulfill their hobbies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college location is great and helps to keep calm and focused, but it is more crowded than needed

content.Placements: At Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal, not more than 10-15 students are placed on average, which is very low compared to other universities. This year, the highest package is 47 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA, which will make a huge impact on the average package.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, but not good enough to make students happy. Students can only adjust to those facilities but not be happy about them, and they can't even do anything about it. The food in the mess was the worst part, but it has improved after some improvements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the beauty and the placements.

content.Placements: Around 45% students are placed in my college. The highest package is 70 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The top companies are Amazon, Accenture, Google, Atlassian, Microsoft, Apple, etc. Around 70% students get internship. The top roles of the students are AI Software Engineers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are quite good and the infrastructure is also very good for all the courses, for example, Wi-Fi works well, labs and classrooms are cleaned every time by workers, and are in good condition. Library also has many seats and a good librarian. Hostels are also in a very good state and are very clean, including a good food facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The beautiful campus of Uttarakhand.

content.Placements: About 60 to 70% students get placed in our course, and the highest package is of 60 LPA, the lowest package is of 3 LPA, and the average package is of 6 to 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, Amazon, TCS, Wipro, Visa, etc. About 20 to 30% get internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a well developed infrastructure with different classes. Labs, a library, and Wi-Fi facilities for different departments. The quality of food availability in the canteen and mess is very good. All facilities, like medical and sports, are available.

admission_overview.college_name: Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fees, Dates & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Graphic Era Hill University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as CUET, JEE Main, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses.GEHU Bhimtaloffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Sciences, Arts, etc. Candidates can apply online for their preferred courses.
GEHU offers courses in full-time mode. The university offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Below are the key highlights for GEHU admissions:
Particulars
GEHU Admission Highlights 2026
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://bhimtal.gehu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

GEHU offers admission to courses either based on merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance score. Candidates irrespective of the selection criteria need to meet course-specific eligibility requirements to apply for admission. Below areGEHU Bhimtal coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

GEHU offers admission based on entrance test performance or academic merit. Candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. Below are the steps to get a seat in theGraphic Era Hill University Bhimtal:
GEHU Application Process 2026
The mode of application is online. Candidates have to fill out the application form and pay an application fee of INR 1,500 for all courses.

GEHU selects candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for BBA, MCA, BCA and other courses. The university also accepts entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses.
Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates are informed about their admission. Selected aspirants have to pay theGEHU feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Can I join GEHU Bhimtal directly?
faqs.answer: No, You cannot joinGEHU, Bhimtal Directly. Students who have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects are considered eligible to join B.Tech. course.Candidates are admitted to the UG courses through GEJET (Graphic Era Joint Entrance Test) conducted by the University.JEE Main and GEJET scoresare used to determine admission to B.Tech programs.Students can enroll in the M.Tech programme if they have completed their BE or B.Tech in any discipline. Candidates are chosen for admission to the M.Tech programme based on theirGATE score, which must be valid.To apply for a Ph.D., a candidate must have completed a post-graduate degree in a relevant field.NET, SLET, and GATEare the criteria for admission to the Ph.D. program. Written exams and interviews are then  conducted.Applicants may applyOffline or Onlinein both types.In order to be eligible for admission to the BSc, B.Com, BCA, and BBA programs, candidates must have earned at least50% marksin their 10+2 pro

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by GEHU Bhimtal for admission?
faqs.answer: For BBA all interested candidates should have passed Class XII from a recognised board of examination in any stream with not less than 50% marks.For BCA  Pass in the Plus two examination or equivalent of any recognised board in India with 50% marks in all streams, with Basic Mathematics (up to 10th standard).For BTECH all interested candidates should have passed Class XII from a recognised board of examination with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry . Candidates who have successfully cleared JEE Mains will also be considered for admission on the basis of thier JEE Mains scores based on the cut off.
