placement_data.title: Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Graphic Era Hill University conducts placement drive annually on its campus. It invite companies from leading global technology firms, financial institutions, consulting companies and core engineering organizations for its placements annually. The university’s placement performance is particularly good in Computer Science & Engineering and allied technology programs. The highest package offered offered during Graphic Era Hill University placements 2025 was INR 47.88 LPA. This package was offered by the Amazon to the students of BTech CSE batch 2025. The top recruiters of Graphic Era Hill University, Nainital in 2025 include Amazon, Visa, BNY Mellon, Infosys, Voltas, etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during the recent Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal placement?
faqs.answer: The average package offered during Graphic Era Hill University Nainital placements 2025 was INR 18.3 LPA. Note: This package has been taken after calculating all the salaries offered to the batch 2025.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered to BBA students at Graphic Era Hill University?
faqs.answer: As per the report Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal NIRF Report 2025, the median package offered to UG three-year students in the 2024 placement drive was INR 4.1 LPA. Earlier, in 2023, the median package offered to UG three-year students was INR 4.25 LPA. Note: T he above placement data is not course-specific. It has been fetched from the official NIRF report. Moreover, the data is only for UG three-year courses offered by the university.

faqs.question: What kind of jobs can I pursue after completing BBA from Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal?
faqs.answer: After completing the BBA course offered by Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal, students have a wide range of job opportunities. In general, BBA degree holders are eligible for different career paths, each with the potential for attractive earnings. However, it also depends on the individual skill set. Check below to find a list of various job profiles for BBA degree holders to pursue and their corresponding average salaries: Business Development Managers: INR 7.4 LPA Research Assistant: INR 3.8 - 4.2 LPA Operations Analyst: INR 5.1 - 6 LPA HR Analyst: INR 5 - 6 LPA Investment Bankers: INR 8 LPA Financial Managers: INR 9 LPA Digital Marketer: INR 4 - 5 LPA

faqs.question: How are BCom placements at Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal?
faqs.answer: The Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal BCom placement report will be out soon. In the meantime, students can take a look at the NIRF Report 2025 released by the university. As per that, 233 UG three-year students were placed in 2024. Other than this, the median package bagged by these students was INR 4.1 LPA. Note: Th e above placement data is not course-specific. It has been fetched from the official NIRF report. Moreover, the data is only for UG three-year courses offered by the university.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Graphic Era Hill University, Bhimtal.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided by our college, like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, medical facilities, games, etc. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-designed. The hostel building is also neat, clean, and well-designed. The food quality available in the mess and canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: 2025 is good compared to 2015.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good on our campus. All the things are well settled and are working. All the students are provided with a computer to do their practical tasks in the college, while students have the freedom to play our game, which we play well, or to fulfill their hobbies.

reviews.review_heading: The college location is great and helps to keep calm and focused, but it is more crowded than needed
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, but not good enough to make students happy. Students can only adjust to those facilities but not be happy about them, and they can't even do anything about it. The food in the mess was the worst part, but it has improved after some improvements.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the beauty and the placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are quite good and the infrastructure is also very good for all the courses, for example, Wi-Fi works well, labs and classrooms are cleaned every time by workers, and are in good condition. Library also has many seats and a good librarian. Hostels are also in a very good state and are very clean, including a good food facility.

reviews.review_heading: The beautiful campus of Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well developed infrastructure with different classes. Labs, a library, and Wi-Fi facilities for different departments. The quality of food availability in the canteen and mess is very good. All facilities, like medical and sports, are available.

reviews.review_heading: The blunt truth about GEHU Bhimtal is its beautiful campus and location.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is average. Labs can easily accommodate at least 90 students at a time. The infrastructure is good and maintained properly. Classrooms have a capacity of 75 students. The library has all the course-related books available, but only 40 students can sit in the library at a time. Hostel rooms are neat and ventilated. Washrooms are well-maintained. Food in the mess is good, especially on weekends. Meals are pre-decided. We have a medical clinic, and a pharmacist is always available. For ...

reviews.review_heading: Graphic Era Hill University is the 11th most beautiful campus in the country.
reviews.review_text: A well developed infrastructure for all the departments and labs. Labs system works well without loss of connection. The library infrastructure is good, and it is silent. Hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: The beautiful campus of Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good, and it is also a beautiful campus in Uttarakhand. The college has different buildings for different departments with Wi-Fi facilities, smart boards, labs, and a well-organised library. The medical canteen and mess facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good location, and is surrounded by hills and greenery.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in every classroom and every lab. Classrooms are large and properly ventilated. Smartboards are used in classrooms. Every student has access to the library and library books. Food is average in the mess, better in the canteen. A dispensary is available for medical facilities. Basketball court, volleyball court, and football ground are available.

reviews.review_heading: In my opinion, I should not judge the faculty from 2015 to 2025.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are good, the infrastructure of our college was outstanding, labs and classrooms are well painted, and all the facilities are available there, like a smart board, monitor, etc., which are required in the lab or classroom to study. The food in the hostel also helps us to fulfill our stomach needs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is average, not too good, not too bad.
reviews.review_text: Food at the mess is average, not too good, not too bad, classrooms are good, library is also good, but there's always some issue with the Wi-Fi. Students of batch 25-26 are also placed at the beginning of their final year, one girl at Attlasian with a package of 66 LPA and another girl at JPMorgan with a package of 20 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Our faculty had good placements in 2015 due to the good facilities for study.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good at our college. Our college has a huge library in which all types of books are available, but for a limited time, we have to return the book within 30 days. Otherwise, we have to pay a fine for the late submission of the book.

reviews.review_heading: Good services, good placement record, and amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-established classroom and a huge library on our campus, and it has Wi-Fi all over the campus. We can issue any kind of book from library, and there is a time period of one month to reissue the book otherwise, students have to pay a fine.

reviews.review_heading: I would like to recommend you to take admission in this beautiful university.
reviews.review_text: Facilities for 1st year students are a bit better than facilities given to other year students, and the same in terms of infrastructure. While Wi-Fi, classrooms, and Library facilities and infrastructure are the same for all. There are two mess in total, the main mess's food quality is edible, while Mapple Mess serves way better food in quality. While the canteen, sports, and games facilities are good. Medical facilities need a bit of improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It is a beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are nice, and the infrastructure is nice as well. It has two buildings: an academic block and an admin block. The academic block is where all senior students are taught. The hostel facilities are good too; the food is a little bit bad, but the breakfast is great.

Graphic Era Hill University Bhimtal provides various modes of payment to students who wish to pay BCom fees. One of the easiest modes is online. In this mode, students can pay the fees from the convenience of their homes. They get various options, such as net banking, debit card, UPI, etc. The other way is to produce a demand draft of the required fees and submit it at the concerned office in person.

Students who are enrolled in one of the Graphic Era Bhimtal BBA courses and wish to reside in hostels must pay hostel fees. This fee is charged on an annual basis. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied.

content.Placements: 20% of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest package is 2.75 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. 25% of students get internships in our course and receive a stipend. If they perform well, they get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our department include a laboratory and a library. The quality of facilities in the hostel is poor, but the food is good. The canteen is good, but the prices are not fair for the food. Some items are not available in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with my placements.

content.Placements: Only 30% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.75 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Around 4 students got internships from the IT course at Auroitech, 2 of them from ECE, and 5 from the CSE department. Around 20 students got placed in the mechanical department.
content.Infrastructure: We have facilities. Instruments and facilities in the lab are very old. The quality of facilities in the hostel is average. The mess is also average. Medical facilities are also average. Sports and games are held. Instruments bought earlier and needed to be improved or replaced with new ones. Sports are good.

In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 1582; whereas in 2023, the cutoff rank stood at 882 for the General AI quota. Comparing the latest year's first-round cutoff with the past two years, a fluctuating trend can be seen for MCA admission.

college_info.intro: The flagship programme offered at Unique Institute of Management is an MBA. The institute provides this programme to students at the PG level. Apart from the MBA course, the institute also offers super advanced MBA and certification courses. The institute offers an MBA programme for a duration of 2 years. The basic eligibility criteria for MBA admission is 50% in graduation from a recognised university. Unique Institute of Management courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Unique Institute of Management, their respective eligibility and UIMPUNE fees:

placements.overview: The placement cell of the Unique Institute of Management is committed to providing students with training and professional opportunities throughout their academic careers. The placement cell maintains contact with various industry sources, organises on-campus training and recruitment and informs the students about placement opportunities. Unique Institute of Management offers 100% placement assistance. The institute maintains a 100% placement rate. The highest and average package offered during Unique Institute of Management placements 2024 was INR 40 LPA and INR 7 LPA. Top companies visit UIMPUNE for placements such as Amul, ITC Limited, TCS, Flipkart, Force Motors, Carwale, Intellipaat, Godrej, Bonville, Cosmos Bank, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The mode of admission at Unique Institute of Management is online. At the postgraduate level, the institute provides a two-year regular MBA programme for students. The institute offers an MBA in seven specialisations, including Marketing Management, Agri-business Management, Financial Management, Pharma & Healthcare Management, Human Resource Management, Operations & Supply Chain Management, and Business Analytics. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Unique Institute of Management and their respective eligibility and fees:

admission_process.title: Unique Institute of Management (UIM, Pune) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Unique Institute of Management (UIM, Pune)admission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers MBA courses at the PG level. The selection criteria are entrance-based. To get admitted to UIM, Pune, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process at the Unique Institute of Management (UIM, Pune) is conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutUnique Institute of Management (UIM, Pune)course admission2025.

Unique Institute of Management course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the institute must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forUnique Institute of Management courses:
MAT/XAT/GMAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMAandMAH CET
Read More:UIM Course details

Unique Institute of Management admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Unique Institute of Management is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Unique Institute of Management Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various PG programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://uimpune.com/eligibility/. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute admits students based on various national-level entrance exam scores, i.e., MH-CET/MH-CAT/MH-XAT/ATMA. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theUnique Institute of Management feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is very good, and students can ask teachers for every facility.

review_content.Placements: I am a first-year student, and two of our class students are placed for SIP in ITC of marketing specialisation. In the upcoming 1 to 2 weeks SIP for operation and supply chain management will be coming. Almost 50% of the seniors got placed. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA and the average salary package offered was 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities for the department like a library, computer labs, air-conditioners, access to the internet during the lecture for any query, projectors, huge seminar hall, clean environment on the campus and dustbins in each class and out of class also. The canteen is clean and huge, and they have good food and variety.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good MBA institute in Nashik.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of the students get placed from our college through on-campus placements. The highest salary package offered for 2019-2020 batch is 12 LPA, and the average salary package offered is around 3 LPA. The top recruiter for our course is HDFC. Around 30% of the students got internships from our college. It is a good college for marketing and finance. Many opportunities are available for live projects as well as for internships, mostly for the marketing course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the classrooms are also very nice. Our institute has air-conditioned classrooms with projector facility, and the computer lab is good. The library facility is also available here. MBA department has a separate library, and books from best authors are available.

content.Placements: To my knowledge, 50 to 60% of the of the students placed in the 2024 batch come from FMCG companies and IT companies who come for campus hiring. The highest package is 7.2 LPA and the lowest package is 2.1 LPA. 10 to 20% of students got internship opportunities. They promised later they would be given a full-time job. HDFC Bank and HUL are the top hiring firms.
content.Infrastructure: Bhujbal Knowledge City is known for the infrastructure it recently built. All-day Wi-Fi is available on campus, and classrooms have projectors and AC. The library is the best-looking seating arrangement. I give 10/10 for facilities. The hostel is large, and it has its own gym. Extra charges apply for the gym. Mess food is available in both vegetarian and non-vegetarian varieties, and it costs approximately 45,000 per year.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is very good, and students can ask teachers for every facility.

content.Placements: I am a first-year student, and two of our class students are placed for SIP in ITC of marketing specialisation. In the upcoming 1 to 2 weeks SIP for operation and supply chain management will be coming. Almost 50% of the seniors got placed. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA and the average salary package offered was 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities for the department like a library, computer labs, air-conditioners, access to the internet during the lecture for any query, projectors, huge seminar hall, clean environment on the campus and dustbins in each class and out of class also. The canteen is clean and huge, and they have good food and variety.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good MBA institute in Nashik.

content.Placements: Around 80% of the students get placed from our college through on-campus placements. The highest salary package offered for 2019-2020 batch is 12 LPA, and the average salary package offered is around 3 LPA. The top recruiter for our course is HDFC. Around 30% of the students got internships from our college. It is a good college for marketing and finance. Many opportunities are available for live projects as well as for internships, mostly for the marketing course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the classrooms are also very nice. Our institute has air-conditioned classrooms with projector facility, and the computer lab is good. The library facility is also available here. MBA department has a separate library, and books from best authors are available.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Superb infrastructure of MET IOM Campus. All facilities are given to students.

content.Placements: 1) last year 80% of the students got placed and remaining become entrepreneurs. 2) 7.25 is the highest and 2.05 is the lowest. 3) HDFC, Amazon, etc. came for recruitment. 4) 70% students have got internship in companies such as PVC, banks, FMCG companies, etc.
content.Infrastructure: 24*7 Wi-Fi is available, fully furnished labs are there. Classrooms are having AC. Library is an attractive part of MET IOM campus. All facilities are available. 2) 5 star rating should be given as the answer of these questions. Sports activity like badminton, cricket is available.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in MET's Institute of Management for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
MET's Institute of Management has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline awarded by any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories (VJ/DT- NT (A), NT (B), NT (C), NT (D), SBC, SEBC) and PwD belonging to Maharashtra State only) or its equivalent. 
Candidates appeared for the final year examination are also eligible to apply.
Maharashtra State candidate must have obtained more than zero score in MAH CET 2020.
All India/Jammu and Kashmir Migrant candidate should have obtained more than zero score in MAH CET/CAT/CMAT/MAT/GMAT/ATMA/XAT.

description: MET's Institute of Management Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

The MET's Institute of Management MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 86. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 82.93 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at MET's Institute of Management was 86. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 73 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 74.78.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students can view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

MET's Institute of Management MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 74.78 to 67.36 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 67.36. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024, and 2023.

review_content.Placements: The average is the same as usual in these tier colleges mostly depend on your skills do not wait for placement cell to place you.

Its like you just grow only here if you find people here of the same mindset otherwise you have to do everything else by your own. Auditorium and other facilities are there.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty are almost good to some extent sometimes a little bit delayed. Actually its really unpredictable like sometimes everything is fine and sometimes its a little bit of a nuisance. Some changes need to be made and everything would be fine enough to go there.

content.Placements: The placement here is not bad, but it is average. If you put in a little extra effort here, then the placement will be good, and in the coming time, it will be best to afford this college for placement. For placement, you will have to focus on skills from the first year itself, and for this, you can work on a laptop.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and it has even been renovated this year, so things are better than before. There is even Wi-Fi here, which is very helpful for the students. The library is quiet, and the benches are nice to sit on, and the classrooms are nice, and they are cleaned every shift.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Everything is fine to some extent. As a low-tier college, it is acceptable at this level.

content.Placements: I am currently doing B.Tech CSE here. I have noticed that there is one placement ongoing. I have heard most students say that everything is decent, and it also depends on your skills. You have to do everything yourself. I guess everyone just needs to hear this.
content.Infrastructure: The ground and hostel facilities are really awesome. The mess is good to some extent. Hostel services are above average. There are grounds for playing cricket, football, and indoor sports. A running track and the university gym are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Everything is fine enough its like a college you have to do everything on your own.

content.Placements: The average is the same as usual in these tier colleges mostly depend on your skills do not wait for placement cell to place you.
content.Infrastructure: Everything else is good enough its not much excellent but its good enough like class ground and hostel facility is fine enough. Its like you just grow only here if you find people here of the same mindset otherwise you have to do everything else by your own. Auditorium and other facilities are there.
content.Faculty: Faculty are almost good to some extent sometimes a little bit delayed. Actually its really unpredictable like sometimes everything is fine and sometimes its a little bit of a nuisance. Some changes need to be made and everything would be fine enough to go there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University.

content.Placements: My course is Bachelor of Business Administration BBA. There are a few students who get placement offers provided by the college. The placements are good, approximately 5 to 7 LPA. The placement head is so knowledgeable. He provides the best guidance for students.
content.Infrastructure: There are many courses available for students to learn and grow by studying. There are good facilities for sports like badminton, football, athletics, and judo. The coaches are available at the university. Hostels are good. Food is also good, in terms of care, health, and hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college experience is good so far.

content.Placements: I have not seen such placements here. Seniors used to tell us that we have to study hard to get a placement because the college provides very few placement opportunities. I suggest that they are improving themselves and doing well right now for the benefit of students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing one of the best infrastructures I have ever seen. The area of the campus is insane like 131 acres. We have a good hostel life and all and everything is good. The library section is one of my favourite areas where I spend a lot of time.

admission_process.title: Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission procedure for Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University involves multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, applying, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission must fulfil all of the required admission criteria before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailedDr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University admissions process:
Step 1: Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University Application Process 2025

Aspirants are allowed to apply online at https://dsmnru.up.nic.in.Candidates must enrol, complete academic and personal information, have scanned copies of documents attached, and pay an application fee of INR 1,000 (INR 500 SC/ST/ PwD).CUET-UG or CUET-PG scores are required for most undergraduate and postgraduate programs.Depending on the course requirements, professional programmes
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The most important requirement of selection is based on the performance in the entrance exam (CUET or other national-level examinations).In certain diploma and certificate programmes, admission is merit-based on the qualifying examination.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

The accepted applicants have to participate in the counselling process, with sitting being assigned on the basis of the entrance achievements, course selection, and booking regulations.The documents are verified, and the admission fee is paid before admission is confirmed.According to the act of 2009 Act, the DSMNRU Act 2009, the seats of every category are allotted 50% Divyang (PwD)category candidates, of which half are allotted to the blind-visual candidates.The SC, ST and OBC (non-creamy layer) of Uttar Pradesh enjoy the benefit of reservation and the SC, ST and OBC of other states are put in the General category. For the final steps the candidates will have to pay theDr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University fee.

Dr Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University feesmay include various elements including Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. reviews.review_heading: This is best for your college life, so enjoy your college journey.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and it has even been renovated this year, so things are better than before. There is even Wi-Fi here, which is very helpful for the students. The library is quiet, and the benches are nice to sit on, and the classrooms are nice, and they are cleaned every shift.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine to some extent. As a low-tier college, it is acceptable at this level.
reviews.review_text: The ground and hostel facilities are really awesome. The mess is good to some extent. Hostel services are above average. There are grounds for playing cricket, football, and indoor sports. A running track and the university gym are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine enough its like a college you have to do everything on your own.
reviews.review_text: Everything else is good enough its not much excellent but its good enough like class ground and hostel facility is fine enough. Its like you just grow only here if you find people here of the same mindset otherwise you have to do everything else by your own. Auditorium and other facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University.
reviews.review_text: There are many courses available for students to learn and grow by studying. There are good facilities for sports like badminton, football, athletics, and judo. The coaches are available at the university. Hostels are good. Food is also good, in terms of care, health, and hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience is good so far.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing one of the best infrastructures I have ever seen. The area of the campus is insane like 131 acres. We have a good hostel life and all and everything is good. The library section is one of my favourite areas where I spend a lot of time.

reviews.review_heading: I'm a student of Civil Engineering, batch 2024 at IET DSMNRU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in my college; they have many buildings for other departments, like the IET department. Spread across 131 acres, the campus features architecturally distinct buildings designed with accessibility in mind, including ramps, lifts, and wide corridors suitable for differently-abled students. Engineering and IT departments have well-equipped, air-conditioned labs. For CSE, there are separate labs for Operating Systems, Network, DBMS, AI/ML, and more. Civil engineering ...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students. We also learn about life-changing challenges here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in my college. Classrooms are very good. There is Wi-Fi, labs, and the library in my college. A computer lab is available. It also has an auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: I am okay with facilities provided by our college as it have good infrastructure also.
reviews.review_text: College has very good infrastructure and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in many areas such as hostels and library. College provides very good facilities of hostel and mess food and also good infrastructure for sports and games. All types of grounds and stadiums are available for practice. College has a 24/7 ambulance available in our college for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: This is a state government university.
reviews.review_text: Campus and facilities are extremely good. It is a state government university. All facilities are available. Library is available and there is also Lift available in every building. So we can say that college infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review of the university; you can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the hostel infrastructure, as well as the university infrastructure, are just awesome, which makes for a good environment on campus. The university provides many facilities, like a well-equipped library where students can study and a canteen whose quality is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Shakuntala Misra National Rehabilitation University.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, with LAN and Ethernet connections in every room. Labs are being developed and getting equipped with time. The library is also Wi-Fi enabled and well furnished, with three floors and all the necessary study material we need.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are average facilities like labs, classrooms, libraries, and Wi-Fi campuses. There are also sports and medical facilities available. There are many athletes who have played at the state level. The canteen is average because of a lack of infrastructure but it develops day by day because of our new VC, sir.

reviews.review_heading: College review about IET - DSMNRU .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with infrastructure like fans, benches, a board, and windows. Classrooms are spacious. The college has one common library. library is well maintained and has good collection of books. Students can borrow course-related books from library. Wi-Fi facility are available only in computer labs. The computer lab was well-equipped and had AC as well. I didn't opt for hostels so not have little idea about hostels. The college has an ambulance, which they provide in case of a medi...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the all things except placement cell.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The university theme is similar to IIT, and it offers all courses such as engineering, medical, commerce, arts, and education. All departments are separate, and there is no interference between them. The hostel is good, and all the basic necessities are available at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Gem faculty, college in transition stage.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are really good, well-furnished, and properly ventilated. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled; you just need to get your ID and password. The labs are also designed to suit us with all the necessary equipment. The library has all the necessary materials according to our curriculum plus some well-known literary works. I don't live in the hostel, but the sports facilities are world-class, with the campus having its own indoor stadium.

courses.overview: Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology Courses & Fees 2025 Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology is known for its diverse academic offerings, catering to students across multiple disciplines. The Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology provides UG and PG courses that prepare candidates for their professional careers. All these programmes are offered in the streams of Engineering and Business & Management Studies, among others. Admission is based on merit/entrance exam scores, with additional requirements for specific programs. Interested students can find a complete list of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology courses, eligibility criteria, and tuition fees in the table below:

faqs.answer: Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates who have passed MCA are also eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with the mentioned marks (45 % marks in BC Category ) in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University. The qualifying degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for low rankers, and it also provides good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Hi, I am Sami from Lords College. In the placement scenario, around 60 percent of students get placed, but the packages are less in comparison to other colleges. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average is around 5 LPA. Companies like Accenture and Byju's are top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, and labs are also excellent. These help us in learning more knowledge by providing good labs and better infrastructure. In our college, those who are interested in sports are provided with financial and mental support so that they can achieve their goals.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college of my life ever.

content.Placements: Our college has a strong focus on student employability. They provide excellent placement support opportunities through their dedicated Training and Placement Cell. Each year, top companies across various sectors visit our campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides modern and well-equipped facilities to support academic excellence in the MBA. It includes smart classrooms, digital boards, projectors, and learning spaces. Dedicated centres for student projects, coding, and R&D labs offer working space in our university.

content.Placements: In my CSE batch, around 60-70% of students got placed. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA. While the average salary is around somewhere near 4 LPA. The lowest salary is around 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Mahindra are some of the recruiters. Almost every student got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. We have smart classrooms, decent computer labs, and Wi-Fi on-campus is stable. The library is well-maintained with both physical books and digital access. As for the hostel, it's basic but clean, the rooms are okay. The mess food is also decent.

library.description:
Library has a collection of 3,7259 volumes, 9,589 titles, 5342 e-books, 8000 e-Journals on Social Sciences & Humanities, 17900 e-Journals on Science and Technology, 144 print journals and 1,168 CD's.
It can accommodate 272 students at a time and follows the open access system. In addition to the central library, there are departmental libraries as well. E-Resources of library include DELNET (Database), J-Gate(E-Journal), EBSCO(E-Books).

Dedicated centres for student projects, coding, and R&D labs offer working space in our university.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for college more than studies you can take admission.
reviews.review_text: I love the infrastructure of the college they provides everything that is necessary for software and hardware engineers like labs, computer labs, mechanical labs, and 3D printing labs. They provide their own hostels that have good mess and canteens.

reviews.review_heading: The journey to become a graduate.
reviews.review_text: We had facilities available for the course, but unfortunately, most of them did not work as expected. Wi-Fi was unavailable on campus for students. There was a hostel facility available, and we had a canteen that served average-quality food. We also had sports and games available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning experience with helpful faculty members, decent placements, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. We have smart classrooms, decent computer labs, and Wi-Fi on-campus is stable. The library is well-maintained with both physical books and digital access. As for the hostel, it's basic but clean, the rooms are okay. The mess food is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: The campus and placements are good, but it need more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: The campus has good Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a library full of books. Classrooms are well-maintained, and every class has a projector. The canteen has good hygiene. The campus also has a sports ground, a separate sports room for girls, and a gym also.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college for the data science department are classrooms equipped with modern teaching facilities such as projectors, digital boards, etc., labs with advanced systems and software, a well-stocked library with many books related to the data science field, and high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the campus. Our college does not provide any hostel facility so students need to look for hostels near the college. There are soo many hostels near the college. Some hostels are separate f...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very beautiful and very helpful for students. In our department, every classroom has Wi-Fi with a computer system. In every classroom, there are digital boards and projectors. Our college has a big library with so many books and journals. Our college has computer labs with advance software that are useful for students to learn new technologies and software. Our college does not provide any hostel facility, students have to look for hostel by themselves near the coll...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very big and beautiful. Facilities provided by the college in my course are free Wi-Fi to clear any doubts and computer labs for practice. Classrooms size is fine with a seating capacity of 60 students. Our classrooms have projectors with digital boards. The college does not provide any hostel facility and students need to look for the hostel near the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very beautiful and big. It has a big garden. Facilities provided for data science in my college are big labs with advanced systems and a library with many books. Every class has projectors for PPTs. The college does not provide any hostel facility. I suggest students opt for flats with their friends instead of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the infrastructure is very big and beautiful. It has a big and beautiful garden. Facilities available for my course are big and excellent labs with smart computer systems and a library for any doubt clearance. The hostel facility is average. I paid Rs. 5,000 per month as hostel fees. The quality of food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very poor. We cannot use WhatsApp. The canteen is very unhealthy. Washrooms are not clean. The parking space is not available. There are no medical facilities in our college. There are many activities in sports. It conducts many events.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. It mainly focuses on improving English and technical skills.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and labs are clean. The college is very strict about cleanliness and hygiene. Before going to the lab, you need to remove your footwear. The lab in charge is very cooperative and they guide you on how to do experiments.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is awesome.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good. They have large parking and a large cricket and football ground. We have a volleyball court. Our classrooms are good compared to other colleges. We have good projectors and labs. All the equipment is available in the lab. There is a large library. We have a good canteen. Every year, we celebrate a sports day. Good food is available in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The disappointment of Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: We at first had horrendous Wi-Fi, and although labs are kept, they really need new chairs. The library is absolutely amazing, therefore I am satisfied. No hostel, okay canteen, and the bare minimum of sports in our college. The medical facilities are not available.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology

likes.text: The college offers B.Tech in mechanical, civil, CSE, ECE, EEE, petroleum, and top recruiting companies are Byjus, Amazon, Tata Consultancy Services, Wipro and many more.
The college offered many internships for the students, Also, many students got placed in many companies.

review_content.Placements: 10% of the students get placement by the college. The highest package is 8.7LPA and the lowest package is not fix. Average package is 2-3 LPA There are no top companies for the recruitment. 99% student get internship but no practical work provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is really a nice experience to be in Ashoka Business School.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students got placed from our course. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 2.5 LPA to 10 LPA. PropertyPistol, Byju's, Ashoka Buildcon, Accenture, Ceat, CA Technologies, Bosch, Central Bank of India, Rishabh Instruments, Tech Mahindra, Mahindra Satyam, SBI Vip and Jargon are top recruiters for our course. About 90% of students got summer internships in companies like Ashoka Buildcon, BP Sangle, Agile Capital Services, Bitzol, etc. MBA student representative and secretary are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, our college is good, and it has nice infrastructure. Our college provides a canteen, play area and library. The quality of food served is good, and the hostel facility is available. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are not paid much attention here as there is no ground. Football and cricket leagues are organised. It is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, but the password is not provided. Classrooms are also spacious, and it is a clean campus.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in the college but the only issue is that there is no placement.

content.Placements: 10% of the students get placement by the college. The highest package is 8.7LPA and the lowest package is not fix. Average package is 2-3 LPA There are no top companies for the recruitment. 99% student get internship but no practical work provided.
content.Infrastructure: College provide every kind of service like Wi-Fi, labs, digital classroom, library and etc. Everything is good regarding the infrastructure.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful in nature, they are very well qualified and knowledgeable, their teaching quality is very good. The students are made well ready for the industry but they don't get placement from the college there is no top companies coming for placement.

description: Ashoka Business School cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA course. The cutoff was released in the form of percentiles for all rounds and categories for the students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. This page contains Ashoka Business School MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs for various rounds and categories. More exam-related updates are below:

The Ashoka Business School MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 67.17. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 71.15 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Ashoka Business School was 67.17. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 63.63 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 43.85.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider RIMS - Rourkela Institute of Management Studies as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: RIMS - Rourkela Institute of Management Studies is a reputed institute for MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, RIMS - Rourkela Institute of Management Studies has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: RIMS - Rourkela Institute of Management Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A place to remember, to cherish those beautiful moments.

content.Placements: I was from the 2022 batch and my course was BBA specialisation in HR. There are no placements for BBA. But other departments have their placements.
content.Infrastructure: The computer labs are well-equipped with the latest technology, and the overall infrastructure is really good. Although the hostel facilities are really good as well.
content.Faculty: The faculty at RIMS were very helpful and understanding, and they guided us throughout the course. Our HOD was a really good human being who understood our problems and difficulties. The curriculum was good as well, and it was completed on time. The courses were easy to understand.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to study in.

content.Placements: Placements are provided depending on the course. Around 10% of students are interested to do internships.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs are well maintained. Classrooms have air-conditioners. Library has many books. Canteen serves good food based on prices.
content.Faculty: Exams are not difficult. The pass marks are 20 out of 60. Teachers are well-qualified and helpful. The course curriculum is good. It makes students industry ready.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied from this college. It is totally value for money studying here.

content.Placements: Top recruiters are NIIT Technologies, Flipkart, Amazon, Mastercard, TCS, TechMahindra. Average LPA offered is 8 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA and the highest is 10 LPA.100percent students are getting placements here. Flipkart and TCS offers 80percentage students internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure facilities available in this department is very excellent. Library has a wide choice of books. Wi-Fi coverage is available throughout the campus. Classrooms are very clean with proper boards and smartclasses. Hostel is excellent and food in the canteen is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Average college with fair return on investment .

content.Placements: The placements are not as expected since the college is situated in area where airport is there, so companies are hesitant to come so far. If someone is looking for guaranteed placements, he /she should not choose this college, the placements depend on your skills and knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and nice accommodation are there. Spacious campus and clean rooms for the student. There is no Wi-Fi, library is good. The library has various kinds of books both fictional, one can issue books hassle free and condition of library is really good, and ventilation is quite good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I suggest students join this college to get a better future and easy learning.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Several companies visited our college for placements in recent times, and some recruit through video calls. Some companies which showed interest in hiring students are Genpact, PwC, Vedanta, Adhunik, TCS, etc. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA to our topper. About 20% of the students get placement, while many students prefer further studies that might not be selected or maybe not part of recruitment. Some students get top management and middle management roles.
content.Infrastructure: Top-class facilities are available on our campus. There is proper sanitation and cleanliness. Classrooms and laboratories are installed with Wi-Fi and CCTV facilities. Management knows what suit the student most so there is a canteen in the middle of campus which is good for gathering. The food served is properly hygienic.

hostel_campus.college_name: Imarticus Learning Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institute.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is not available in our college. Classrooms, a canteen, and a library are good with air-conditioners. Staff members are friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Course was good, and I got placed. I am satisfied with the institute .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the institute was decent enough, and the location of the institute is in an accessible place, Koramangala. Frequent bus facilities are available from this location, and the institute has a parking facility for 2-wheelers. Nearby hotels are available for food .

reviews.review_heading: I had a great experience at Imarticus Learning in the Thane branch. The teacher was really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good and well maintained like wifi facility, classroom facility. If you want study there they made arrangements for it and all other facilities were really good. Staff was also very helpful and always helped us if there was any problem.

reviews.review_heading: Top Most Certification in Investment Banking Operations.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members for the CIBOP program are successful professionals in the investment banking industry and hold valuable experience in the same. They train their students with full passion and commitment. The classroom infrastructure is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, good placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are big with AC and Wi-Fi facilities. They give their best for our comfort. They provide good-quality study materials, for domain and soft skills as well. PPT presentations given by the teachers, as well as personal assistants given by them, are very helpful .

reviews.review_heading: Good and reliable institution to upskill oneself and get placed.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well furnished and air conditioned. Washrooms are clean and hygienic. Lobby area is available to use during break. Exception is also very well furnished. Classrooms are equipped with white boards, presenters are also used while teaching. Very professional overall.

reviews.review_heading: Seamless transition of careers with well structured assistance at every stage.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our class were one of the main reasons for its attraction. Quality education as well as placement assistance were always there to help us. Along with this, they provide relatively little assistance, like Wi-Fi and well-organized classrooms and I can study over there for as long as it is open.

reviews.review_heading: CIBOP - Well designed course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is well designed, like the academics, soft skills grooming sessions and mock tests after every level, which are very essential. The course is a perfect match for students who are looking for an investment banking operations career.

reviews.review_heading: The mentors sticked with me throughout the journey.
reviews.review_text: I did the course through online mode so I am unable to comment on this. But I have heard this from my offline friends that mentors are really friendly. There is a coffee shop nearby which serves really delicious coffee. There is a bit of Wi-Fi problem but it gets resolved quickly.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements and education provided by our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Imarticus Learning is good. There is always an issue with Wi-Fi because of which our classes start late.

reviews.review_heading: Leading institute for Investment Banking Aspirants.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and overview of the course are excellent, with excellent study material and the instructor's knowledge and experience. The study environment is best suited for aspirants aspiring to make investment banking their career. The overview of the course is good, and it is one of the best mediums to pursue various certifications, including CIBOP and Data Analyst.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good course with assured placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms is average. All classrooms are clean. Wi-Fi is good. Some students face Wi-Fi issues. Our college provides good water and parking facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Imarticus Learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, classrooms, etc. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. They provide study materials in softcopy format for a better understanding of the topic.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this course.
reviews.review_text: Our college gives good experience to learn in-depth knowledge of investment banking operations. Imarticus app provides very good notes on the topics and explains them with ease. Recorded classes are beneficial and help students to understand the concepts well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Imarticus Learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All facilities are available. The electricity facility is better. Classrooms are spacious. High-speed Wi-Fi is available. Study material is available on the online platform.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at IBMR Business School, Hubli?

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Excellent placements and placement assistance are provided. Training is provided for aptitude and reasoning skills to crack the interviews. Several workshops are conducted to increase the employability of students. Many top companies come here for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has state-of-the-art infrastructure with Wi-Fi, upgraded laboratories, digital classrooms, and deluxe hostels. The college is located in a serene environment with wonderful scenery. It also has excellent sports facilities. There are no hostel facilities. There are good medical facilities nearby in case of any emergency.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best ranked B-school because of its placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students got placed. The salary package offered is range from 3.5 LPA-10 LPA. The recruiting companies of our course are JP Morgan, Citi Bank, HDFC Bank, Google, Facebook, etc. The top roles offered are management trainee, community management, business analyst, data analyst, financial trainee, marketing executive, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, but there are no hostel facilities, and students have to stay in PGs or other hostels for their education. Classrooms have a Wi-Fi facility. There is a library, and students can access the library and Wi-Fi at any time.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with infrastructure and good placements.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. All classrooms are good. Our college provides a canteen facility. Games are good. Our college is surrounded by a great atmosphere.
review_content.Faculty: Our college consists of top lecturers who help us to focus on our studies in many ways. The course curriculum makes students industry-ready. Exams are moderate.

college_info.intro:
Sabarmati University popular programmes are BSc and MBA. BSc students are placed in top companies in top sectors. BSc is provided through various departments such as Maths, Computer & Informative Sciences, Physics & Astronomical Sciences, and others. BSc students can work as Operations Researcher and can enter in fields such as Data Science, Actuarial Science, Teaching, and others. Sabarmati University is one of the reputed universities that is visited by top companies such as Reliance Retail, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Accenture, and others.
Overall, Sabarmati University is one of the top-ranked universities present in India. Over the years the university has received various awards. MBA students can further plan to seek higher education or can work as Relationship Managers at banks/NBFCs, Credit Analysts, Investment Bankers, Financial Analysts, Finance Managers, and others. Below mentioned are some of the programmes offered by Sabarmati University and their respective eligibility and Sabarmati University fee structure:

Graduates tend to seek employment in public administration, teaching, and social services. Besides, there are opportunities in banking, railways, and other PSUs, where a BA degree is a qual

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, completing a BSc course from Sabarmati University makes students eligible for job opportunities in the public sector of India. The Indian government sector recruits students with knowledge of Computer Science, IT, Mathematics, etc..,  in various capacities. Students who wish to work in reputed public organisations can explore jobs in BHEL, ISRO, GAIL, and more. review_summary.college_name: Sabarmati University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: There are many other good and newly developed buildings and branches in this university.

content.Placements: Most students got placements through this college. The lowest package was 3 LPA, and the highest was 18 LPA. Companies such as Cadila, Mankind, Intas, and Zydus, which are MNCs, participated. Around 30% of students got placed at Zydus, 40% at Cadila, 10% at Intas, and 20% at Mankind. All these roles were offered in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a big AC hall, a library, and Wi-Fi all over the campus. It had neat and clean smart classrooms, parking, a canteen, sitting areas, and more. There were good PG and hostels within 1km of the university, all of which provided pickup and drop-off facilities whenever students had to go to the university. The university timings were from 10am to 2pm.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are good here. The college offers a good environment.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide placements for the students. However, the knowledge provided by them was useful to get a job after graduation. The college doesn't provide internships for the students. Students have to find internships on their own. There is no placement cell in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very good infrastructure including Wi-Fi, sports complex, shuttle service, library, computer and psychology lab. The quality of the classrooms is very good. The college provides separate hostels for boys and girls, which is 6 km away from the campus. Hostels are equipped with every necessary facility like a recreation room, sports complex, etc. Hostels rooms are very clean and comfortable. I didn't face any difficulties regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The Sabarmati University.

content.Placements: Every year placement teams visit our campus, and they give the best placements to students. In my course, last year 57 students were placed by the college in the best companies. So they give a guarantee of 100% placement, and that's true also. So if you're going, don't worry about placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. On-campus, a study environment is provided. My college is the place where I used to spend most of my time. I love that place a lot, and I have lots of friends there. Whenever we get leisure time in the college period, we hang out on the campus. All the teachers are qualified and experienced. They teach us with great care and love.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sabarmati University.

content.Placements: Most of students are placed in my course. In my course, the highest package was 12 lakh per annum and the lowest was, I don't know, I forgot, I think it is 2 lakh per annum. No big companies came to the college. Most of students were doing the internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are there in my course, like Wi-Fi, labs, AC classrooms, but no library. In my college, no canteen, no mess, no sports, no games, no medical facilities are there. And there was not even a good campus. I did not enjoy my college life.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Amazing experience under good guidance.

content.Placements: As it was just a B.A. programme, no such placements were there. Students surely went for higher courses but no internships were required to do so but students were well prepared and mentally ready to work for any MNC and we're encouraged to go for higher studies to achieve the required qualifications.
content.Infrastructure: The college had its hostel, library, and labs as well. There were play grounds as well including a badminton court, a basketball court. Quality of food was much better than that offered in Delhi. The food was as good as any restaurant but simple.

admission_overview.college_name: Sabarmati University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process, Courses, Application Form, Dates

admission_overview.title: Sabarmati University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Sabarmati University (formerly Calorx Teachers' University) offers 18 UG, 10 PG, Diploma, PG Diploma, MPhil and PhD programmes in a regular mode such as BBA, BCom, BA, BCA, B.Ed, LLB, MSc, etc. as well as eight UG and four PG courses under the School of Distance Learning like BA, MA and BCom. It also offers three-year BVoc courses in nine subjects such as Automobile Engineering, Beauty, Salon and Spa, Media and Mass Communication, Tourism and Hospitality, among others with three exit points, namely a certificate (at the end of six months), diploma (at the end of one year) and BVoc degree (at the end of three years). placement_report.college_name: Sabarmati University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Sabarmati University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Sabarmati University provides 100% placement assistance to the students. The placement cell of the University invites the companies taking into consideration the growth prospects and the past record of the recruiters. The Sabarmati University placement cell handholds the entire process from pre-placement training to the final selection. The alumni of the University are currently working with TCS, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, and other renowned companies .

faqs.question: Which are the top companies taking part in the placements drive at Sabarmati University?
faqs.answer: The top companies taking part in the placements drive at Sabarmati University include Vodafone, Aditya Birla Group, Google, Honda, Samsung, TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), Bajaj Allianz, etc. These are some of the companies that have visited Sabarmati University for recruitment. Not as many companies come to Sabarmati University for oncampus placements. One of the best things is that the chance of offcampus placement is very high because they provide 100 percents assistance for placement to all its registered students.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing BSc from Sabarmati University?
faqs.answer: Yes, completing a BSc course from Sabarmati University makes students eligible for job opportunities in the public sector of India. The Indian government sector recruits students with knowledge of Computer Science, IT, Mathematics, etc.., in various capacities. Students who wish to work in reputed public organisations can explore jobs in BHEL, ISRO, GAIL, and more. Fresh graduates are generally given entry-level positions, such as Research Assistant, Jr. Developer, Software Engineer and Quality Analyst . The starting salary offered to fresh graduates working in the public sector ranges from INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA .

hostel.description: Calorx Teachers' University has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. The hostel is located at about 6 kms away from the university and in an eco-friendly green environment. The hostel has all the necessary facilities like sports ground, recreation room and many more.
facilities: Indus University accepts CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ Indus-MAT, followed by a PI. On the other hand,

hostel.description: Calorx Teachers' University has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. The hostel is located at about 6 kms away from the university and in an eco-friendly green environment. The hostel has all the necessary facilities like sports ground, recreation room and many more.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Psychology Lab

reviews.review_heading: There are many other good and newly developed buildings and branches in this university.
reviews.review_text: The college had a big AC hall, a library, and Wi-Fi all over the campus. It had neat and clean smart classrooms, parking, a canteen, sitting areas, and more. There were good PG and hostels within 1km of the university, all of which provided pickup and drop-off facilities whenever students had to go to the university. The university timings were from 10am to 2pm.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are good here. The college offers a good environment.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure including Wi-Fi, sports complex, shuttle service, library, computer and psychology lab. The quality of the classrooms is very good. The college provides separate hostels for boys and girls, which is 6 km away from the campus. Hostels are equipped with every necessary facility like a recreation room, sports complex, etc. Hostels rooms are very clean and comfortable. I didn't face any difficulties regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure...

reviews.review_heading: The Sabarmati University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. On-campus, a study environment is provided. My college is the place where I used to spend most of my time. I love that place a lot, and I have lots of friends there. Whenever we get leisure time in the college period, we hang out on the campus. All the teachers are qualified and experienced. They teach us with great care and love.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sabarmati University.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are there in my course, like Wi-Fi, labs, AC classrooms, but no library.
In my college, no canteen, no mess, no sports, no games, no medical facilities are there.
And there was not even a good campus. I did not enjoy my college life.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing experience under good guidance.
reviews.review_text: The college had its hostel, library, and labs as well. There were play grounds as well including a badminton court, a basketball court. Quality of food was much better than that offered in Delhi. The food was as good as any restaurant but simple.

The courses are offered in affiliation withAnna University. Candidates seeking admission to SBM - Sona School of Business and Management can apply online on the official website.

SBM - Sona School of Business and Management coursesare offered at PG level. As per SBM - Sona School of Business and Management admission criteria, candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility criteria as per course requirement and qualify for any one of the entrance exam conducted by professional bodies for Management programme. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility and seleciton criteria related to SBM - Sona School of Business and Management course admission 2025:
-MAT/ CMAT (60 percentile) orCAT(50 percentile)/ GMAT/TANCET*
Written Admission Test (WAT), Group Discussion, One minute extempore, Psychometric Test & Personal Interview.
*For Management Quota seats via TANCET, the minimum score is 35 and above. However, scores below 35 and more than 30 with a good work experience and communication skill are considered in some cases.
Know more aboutSBM - Sona School of Business and Management courses

SBM - Sona School of Business and Management admission process comprises multiple steps. It begins with an online application process, followed by various selection rounds and ends with a final selection process. Get the elaborated details about SBM - Sona School of Business and Management admission 2025 in the section below:
Step 1: Application Process

SBM - Sona School of Business and Management application process is conducted in online mode. Candidates can apply directly on the official website of the college for admission to MBA programme. While filling the application form, they must also pay an application fee ofINR 650through online payment gateways.
Step 2: Selection Round

SBM - Sona School of Business and Management admissions are completely entrance-based. The college accepts scores of various entrance exams for its MBA programme. These are MAT/ CMAT/ CAT/ TANCET. After getting shortlisted through entrance exam score and past academic merit, candidates must go for further selection rounds as follows:
Moreover, the minimum weightage required for the above accepted entrance exams are as follows:
Step 3: Final Admission
After the conclusion of all the selection rounds, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of SBM - Sona School of Business and Management fee to confirm their seats.

placement_data.title: SBM-School of Business and Management Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The SBM-Sona School of Business and Management offers placement support to all students helping them secure job placements. They provide training in quantitative aptitude, logical reasoning, and verbal skills. Additionally they help students with resume preparation and emphasize importance of group discussions and personal interviews.

In 2024 placement season at SBM-Sona School of Business and Management a total of 151 MBA students were placed. The highest Indian package recorded was INR 16 LPA . The international highest package reached INR 32 LPA during SBM-Sona School of Business and Management placements 2024. Over 250 companies took part in placement season at SBM- Sona School of Business and Management placements. Top recruiters include Intellipaat, Capgemini, Naukri, ITC, HCL Tech, etc.
