reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The following are among the amenities offered by the college. During business hours, Wi-Fi is always available and fast. High-end PCs are available in labs. Benches and projectors are provided. Classrooms are arranged thoughtfully. The cuisine served at the college is of mediocre quality. The cuisine at the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for MBA.
reviews.review_text: There has excellent infrastructure, including spacious, well-maintained labs and a library with ten librarians on duty. There is free WiFi available all around the college, and the hostel exclusively serves vegetarian food; it is not permitted to bring non-vegetarian food onto campus. There are frequent sporting days and first-rate sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best if you want to get into engineering.

reviews.review_heading: This college is nurturing the young minds of tomorrow and makes learning a celebration.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good college, I suggest it to everyone.

review_content.Placements: Nishitha Degree College is an excellent college in the way of studies and placements, but for placements, we need to focus more on preparation by ourselves. Top companies hire students, such as Accenture, Cognizant, TCS, Wipro, ICICI, and L&T, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no hostel facilities in the college, but they may come soon. Many students are living in private hostels nearby. There are many private hostels beside the college for both girls and boys, including hostels near Nishitha International School, but not in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nishitha Degree College.

review_content.Placements: More than 80% of students from my batch have got placements from the college placement cell with a minimum of 2.4 LPA in multinational companies like Genpact, Infosys, TCS, etc., which offer various kinds of job roles in IT and non-IT sectors. For example, BPO and graduate trainee roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is one of the top-notch colleges in Nizamabad district. Coming to infrastructure, we have very good labs, classrooms, library, and Wi-Fi throughout the college. The college not only offers studies but also encourages its students in extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best things about college life is that you get a new experience every day.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage of our batch is 70 to 90%, and the highest package offered in our course is INR 7 lacs. And the lowest package is INR 2 lacs, and the top-rated internships are provided, and many skills are provided by the college, among many other things.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a computer lab, library, and canteen in all of our facilities, and all books are available in the library, so we can study there as much as we want. Teachers and staff are very supportive.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified and have lots of experience. Students and college pass rates are very high, and teachers are very encouraging and provide their best to their students, among many other things.

individual_reviews.title: A good college for the future and learning new skills. I have a positive academic experience.

content.Placements: I belong to the B.Sc in Computer Science batch. Our courses focus on programming languages like C, C++, Java, web technology, HTML, and software development skills. Around 60 to 70 percent of students are selected in campus placements. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Genpact, Accenture, etc., visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The computer science department has good infrastructure with well-equipped computer labs, sufficient computers with updated versions. Classrooms are clean with digital learning. The library has a decent book collection. Hostel facilities are decent with proper rooms, regular maintenance, and adequate security. Medical support is available. In our college, they offer state district-level games for both girls and boys. Many students of our college are selected for games like kho-kho, kabaddi, cricket, etc.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students were placed through my college in the course of B.Sc. MPCs. The topmost companies like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Genpact, etc recruited. 80 percent of students got internships from my course at Wipro. The roles included mapping, data entry, system based roles.
content.Infrastructure: There were good facilities provided in my college and good infrastructure, like a library with all types of books, free Wi-Fi facility, and clean classrooms and clean electric and computer labs. There was good quality food in the hostels and all available food items in the canteen. They provided medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good college, I suggest it to everyone.

content.Placements: Nishitha Degree College is an excellent college in the way of studies and placements, but for placements, we need to focus more on preparation by ourselves. Top companies hire students, such as Accenture, Cognizant, TCS, Wipro, ICICI, and L&T, and more.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostel facilities in the college, but they may come soon. Many students are living in private hostels nearby. There are many private hostels beside the college for both girls and boys, including hostels near Nishitha International School, but not in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Nishitha Degree College.

content.Placements: More than 80% of students from my batch have got placements from the college placement cell with a minimum of 2.4 LPA in multinational companies like Genpact, Infosys, TCS, etc., which offer various kinds of job roles in IT and non-IT sectors. For example, BPO and graduate trainee roles.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is one of the top-notch colleges in Nizamabad district. Coming to infrastructure, we have very good labs, classrooms, library, and Wi-Fi throughout the college. The college not only offers studies but also encourages its students in extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: One of the best things about college life is that you get a new experience every day.

content.Placements: The placement percentage of our batch is 70 to 90%, and the highest package offered in our course is INR 7 lacs. And the lowest package is INR 2 lacs, and the top-rated internships are provided, and many skills are provided by the college, among many other things.
content.Infrastructure: There is a computer lab, library, and canteen in all of our facilities, and all books are available in the library, so we can study there as much as we want. Teachers and staff are very supportive.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified and have lots of experience. Students and college pass rates are very high, and teachers are very encouraging and provide their best to their students, among many other things.

Vaagdevi Degree and PG College offers courses such as MBA, MSc, and MCA as some of the popular programmes. The College offers respective courses in full-time mode for the durations varying from 2 years to 3 years. In addition to this, Vaagdevi Degree and PG College fee structure includes a total tuition fees ranging from INR 43 K to INR 1.1 Lakh.

faqs.answer: A:    The university offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Computer Application, Science, Management, etc. The selection criteria are completely based on the entrance exam as per the course requirement. To get admitted to VDPGC, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute.
faqs.question: Can I get into Vaagdevi Degree and PG College without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Vaagdevi Degree and PG College offers MBA for 2 years in full-time mode on the basis of merit and entrance qualification. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation for primary qualification round. In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as TSICET. The College has not yet indicated Class 12 aggregate as a part of MBA admissions, instead, candidates must qualify graduation.

paragraphs: Vaagdevi Degree and PG College admissionsare completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at the Vaagdevi Degree and PG College is as per the steps below:

reviews.review_heading: A good college with Saraswati Goddess temple.
reviews.review_text: The college was beautiful, clean, and hygienic. We had a canteen in the college, and medical facilities were available in our lab. Sports and games are conducted in my college at the state and national levels. There were several departments for different courses, and it was maintained in a good and hygienic way.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members and good placements for skilled students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college makes every student as like as a student expected. There are many facilities like well-defined laboratory and library for engaging with required books which helps students to get more information about their choice. There are also sports clubs which make students high who are interested.

reviews.review_heading: I am always grateful for our faculty and college.
reviews.review_text: We have all facilities in our college. Our college infrastructure is very good, and it is available for all courses in our college. We have many classrooms and labs. We also have a Wi-Fi facility. There is a canteen in our college. We have a playground. Our college supports students in sports.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good in atmosphere and has good faculty.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are the best labs, classrooms, library, and they give unlimited time to practice in those lab rooms. The canteen and medical room are with a healthy atmosphere. They provide us with games like cricket, and NCC is also available. They care for us in teaching and while playing games, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Warangal.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. Labs are always available. The college conducts cultural events and sports and offers NCC and NSS programs with the best trainers. There is also a library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, but they can improve the computers in the lab.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, featuring a huge building with two blocks. Each block has four floors, and every floor has a computer lab and biology lab. There is super-fast Wi-Fi available for every class. The food in the college hostel is moderate, and the canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good, but teachers are gems.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure; in fact, I love the way it is. Classes are well-maintained and cleaned regularly and can accommodate almost 50-60 students. Projectors are used to teach. The labs contain all essential equipment to carry out the experiments, and the library is very well-equipped, containing all the textbooks and study materials for the exams. The food quality is average and not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with the good labs.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good our college surroundings are hygienic and pleasant. Our college has a campus hostel, which is fully secured for the students with security guard as well as CCTV. We have labs to do experiments or programs; practically, we have pleasant classrooms and a library study in. The hostel food is good .

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. The fan desk and seats in our classrooms are neat, and the laboratories are great. There are many needed books in the library. There is nice food offered in the mess. The medical facilities are also there. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the mess.
reviews.review_text: The hostel's facilities are good. Separate hostels provide for boys and girls. Provide all basic facilities, including water purifiers, washing machines, and a gym. Food is hygienic and provides popular dishes. The classrooms are very big, the labs are good, and a library available on campus. There is no Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vaagdevi Degree and PG College.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in our college. There are many labs available in our college for Computer Science and Physical Science. There are many equipments in our labs, so it is easy to learn. Our hostel has quality food and good facilities. There is also medical facilities in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vaagdevi Degree and PG College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are average; there is Wi-Fi facility, and every department has its own labs according to their requirements. The quality of facilities in the hostel is decent; the quality of food is good, medical facilities are available, but there are no sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good degree college in Warangal.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and the infrastructure are good in the college; the classrooms are neat and have good ventilation. 
There are separate labs for every department and the library has a good amount of books. 
The hostel facilities are good; Wi-Fi is available; the food quality is good; and medical facilities, games and sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, no problems with infrastructure. Good security is provided; no one can bunk classes from college. Farewell and freshers parties happen within the college only. Wi-Fi is available only in labs. Separate computers are provided for each student in labs.

reviews.review_heading: College has average placements.
reviews.review_text: According to infrastructure, our college has good facilities and infrastructure here: Wi-Fi, library, labs, classrooms, mess, canteen, lifts, and AC rooms are now provided in the college and the quality of food is good in campus hostels.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in RMK Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Admission to RMK Engineering College is not much easy, especially because it happens purely on merit. While applying for undergraduate courses including B.E. and B.Tech, candidates would have passed 10+2 with at least a 60% aggregate marking in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. There aren't any entrance exams with admissions happening through TNEA counseling. Although the college has a good reputation and competitive placements, the students coming from other states have to apply under management quota, which requires additional fees. So the admission process is not so complicated and inaccessible for eligible candidates.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for RMK Engineering College admission?
faqs.answer: The admission process for the undergraduate programs of RMK Engineering College is conducted through the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions, commonly known as TNEA. For the academic year 2024, registration commenced on 4th May 2024 and ended on June 4th,  2024. Important dates involved were that of issuing of random number on 7th June 2024 and announcement of rank list on July 12th,  2024. Since it is December 21st,  2024, now the admissions for this academic year have come to a close. Prospective students aiming to apply for the academic year 2025 should expect the timeline to be similar; therefore, applications will likely be up in May 2025. It is also recommended to check the official website of RMK Engineering College and the TNEA portal for any further updates on admission schedules and deadlines.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to RMK Engineering College for MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates must normally pass the Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) administered by Anna University, or the Common Admission Test (CAT) in order to be admitted to the MBA programme at RMK Engineering College. Candidates are assessed by RMK Engineering College according to their academic background, TANCET or CAT results and other qualifying requirements set forth by the university. After taking the entrance exam, applicants take part in a counseling procedure like TANCA which assigns seats according to preference and ranking. Candidates must finish the relevant papers, provide the required documentation, and pay the course fees after being assigned a seat.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by RMK Engineering College for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: RMK Engineering College provides admission with TANCET entrance exam for MBA programs. Only those candidates will be given consideration who will have the minimum aggregate marks of 50% in bachelor's degree. The test is about the knowledge the candidate will have in management studies regarding relevant fields of knowledge. Admission is according to scores obtained in TANCET entrance exam by counseling which is conducted by the college. The college may also consider scores from other relevant exams such as CEETA in certain programs. This will ensure a holistic view of the qualifications and preparedness of applicants in taking the courseware of the MBA program.

reviews.review_heading: R.M.K Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: There is beautiful infrastructure in my college. There are nice classrooms, ventilation and washrooms, all of which are very good. We have free classrooms for students to sit and a library available. We have so many canteens and hostels available for long-distance students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college for growth and development of skills.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are too good and well maintained. Actually, our college is famous for its food. The hostel is well maintained and clean every day by the service staff, and very hygienic in everything. They provide a separate menu each day, both veg and non veg.

reviews.review_heading: A good campus and one of the best choices of my life that I will not regret.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and much more. I feel very good, especially about their food, which is on point. The hostel is very neat and clean. The food is very good. Biryani on Tuesday with potato chips is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and placements with supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities were available in our department. Our college provided high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity, well-equipped computer labs with updated systems, and each class had one projector. Mess and canteen provided a variety of food options, and it was very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: If you are ready to work hard then it's for you.
reviews.review_text: At RMK Engineering College, you can get many opportunities like CAT lab, mech lab, computer lab, etc. The main thing is how you use the facilities that college provides. Be aware of technologies, and the facilities are always available to clear doubts.

reviews.review_heading: The college is eco-friendly with high placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good in our college. Campus-wide high-speed Wi-Fi is available, including in academic blocks, hostels, and the library. Students can access online journals, video lectures, and project tools. There are dedicated labs for computer science and electronics engineering courses.

reviews.review_heading: First step to your career.
reviews.review_text: In our classrooms, we have projectors, and the infrastructure is good. The classrooms are good, and the labs are not okay. The library is very good. In our hostels, the quality of food is excellent. The hostels are good and very hygienic. It is a good environment in hostels, and the mess quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Students who find happiness in little things can join this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is so clean and fresh. There are many staff members assigned to the cleaning department; especially, washrooms are maintained well. The water facility is good in the hostel. Wi-Fi is available 24/7; we get disturbances only when the weather conditions are not good. The library is the most peaceful spot in our college.

reviews.review_heading: In terms of placements, it is okay, but not for the more skilled people, & the faculty is also mode.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are okay, and the infrastructure is also similar. Every department is different, and resources vary for each of them. The food is nice, but the sports and games facilities are lacking, with very few sports events held yearly, and they don't provide time for practice.

faqs.answer: Candidates can apply for Annamalai University admission in online mode through its official website. Interested applicants also need to pay a course-specific application fee to conclude the application process. The university is ranked among the top three Universities in India for best distance education providers. The University has educated over 4.5 Lacs students in the past and continues to teach over thousands more. Hence, it is a good university for candidates wanting to study a distance course.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission to Annamalai University distance education?

faqs.answer: The online/distance degrees offered by the Centre for Distance and Online Education at Annamalai University are valid. Previously, the University Grants Commission (UGC) did not approve its courses starting from 2015. However, Annamalai University DDE received relief from the Madras High Court in an order dated 21.01.2023. Subsequently, following a reassessment by the UGC, Annamalai DDE achieved a qualifying score of 3.38, which led to extending the validity of its programmes until 2027.
faqs.question: Q: Is Annamalai University distance education degree valid?

faqs.answer: Annamalai University DDE offers BFA at the undergraduate (UG) level and MA, MBA, MCom, MFA, MSc, and MSW courses at the Postgraduate (PG) level. Candidates who are interested in getting admission to UG or PG courses offered by this university can apply by visiting the official website. Students can apply for UG admission program-level courses if they have a 10+2 degree in the relevant subject from a university that is known to be good. Admission to courses in UG programs is based only on merit. For PG-level courses, applicants must have a Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field from a university that is recognized. To get into the PG Diploma program, students must have a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university with at least a 50% mark.
faqs.question: Q: When are Annamalai University Distance Education application forms out?

faqs.answer: Annamalai University DDE has not specified any age limit to apply for a course. However, aspirants do need to fulfill the qualification requirements to apply for admission. The basic qualification required for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation for PG programmes.

admission_overview.title: Annamalai University DDE Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Annamalai University Distance Education admission is merit-based for all courses. Candidates can also direct admission via Learner Support Centres under Spot Admission. The university offers UG, PG, diploma, a PG diploma and certificate programmes across the streams of Arts, Science, Management, Fine Arts, Commerce, Social Work, Computer Applications, etc. All the programmes offered by the DDE Annamalai University have the approval of the Distance Education Council, New Delhi. The B.Ed. programme offered through distance education mode is approved by the National Council for Teacher Education, New Delhi. Candidates can fill out the Annamalai University DDE application form on the university's website.

admission_process.title: Annamalai University DDE Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Annamalai University DDE considers qualifying exam marks of the aspirants to offer admission. Aspirants can also get seat via Spot Admission. Currently, admissions are open for all the offered courses. Below are the steps to get a seat at Annamalai University DDE:
STEP 1: Annamalai University DDE Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria have to first get the application form and prospectus from the university's website. Candidates can fill out the form online. For Spot Admission, aspirants living near Learner Support Centres have to submit documents along with the form in-person. Aspirants have to pay an application fee of INR 295 including GST for MBA/ MSc Computer Science and INR 118 including GST for all other courses.
For admission via Post, candidates can send filled-in application form pasted with passport-size photograph along with xerox copies of the documents to the below address:
The Director,
Centre for Distance & Online Education,
Annamalai University,
Annamalainagar – 608 002
STEP 2: Selection

The university reviews the application form of the candidates to confirm their eligibility. Those who are found eligible are granted admission. Applicants living LSC can also get direct admission. For Spot Admission, candidates have to submit filled application along with documents offline. All Spot Admissions are subject to confirmation or cancellation (if found ineligible) by the Director, CD&OE.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

The university informs the aspirants about their selection. Shortlisted candidates have to confirm their seat by paying theAnnamalai University DDE fee. After admission confirmation, the signed ID-card and the original certificates including Transfer Certificate/ Migration Certificate fter affixing a seat on the TC that the candidate is admitted in the academic year, is returned to the student via registered post.
In case the certificates submitted by candidates are found bogus or fake, his or her admission then stands cancelled and the fees remitted will also be forfeited.

DDE Annamalai University feevaries course-wise. The fee for the distance education programme is on the affordable side. The fee for distance education courses starts from as low as INR 900 for certificate programmes and goes up to INR 18,500 for MSc programmes. The step-by-step process of application is:Go to the official website and on the homepage, click on “Admissions DDE Portal”.Click on the 'Course Wing' for which you wish to apply. Further, click on 'Online Payments' and from the drop-down menu that opens up, click on 'Application'Fill out the application form.Upload important documentsPay

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure for BA in Annamalai University DDE?
faqs.answer: For admission to the BA programmes offered at Annamalai University DDE, the aspirants must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria. Aspirants who are Class 12 or equivalent exam pass can apply. The eligible students can visit the official website to register and apply. Then the applications are scanned by the authorities and admission is granted. The applicants whose applications are verified can pay the fee amount for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: Which are the MA specialisations offered at Annamalai University DDE?

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MA at Annamalai University DDE?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University DDE offers admission to MA programme based on merit. The qualifying exam scores of the aspirants are considered for admission. Candidates must have completed a UG degree to apply for MA. Once selected, aspirants can join the programme by paying the admission fee.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for MA at Annamalai University DDE?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MA at Annamalai University DDE isINR 3,600. The total fee includes various components such as tuition fee, admission fee, registration fee, certificate fee, etc. Aspirants who are shortlisted for admission have to pay the programme fee to join the college. Candidates have to pay application fee in the start to apply for a course.

faqs.question: Is Annamalai University DDE MBA admission entrance based?
faqs.answer: No, Annmalai University DDE offers admission to the MBA programme on a merit-basis. There is no entrance score requirement. The university accept applications for the distance course based on merit in the last qualifying examination. Hence, the aspirants performance in the bachelor's degree course is considered for the final selection. However, to be eligible for the course, aspirants must have a valid bachelor's degree of at least three years duration.

MBA is one of the most popular courses offered at Annamalai University DDE.

faqs.question: Where can I check the Annamalai University's enrolment number?

Aspirants also get a confirmation of admission slip with enrolment number. Aspirants can download the slip from the website to check the enrolment number. The first three digits of the enrolment numbers represents the programme code, fourth and fifth digits represents the years of admission.

faqs.question: What should I do if I miss the admission deadline for Annamalai University DDE?
faqs.answer: It is always advised to candidates to keep the track of admission deadline. However, in case they miss the deadline, they can reach out to the admission office of the Annamalai University DDE. Usually, the university gives a good amount of time to aspirants to apply for admission. In case no other option is possible, aspirants can apply in the next session. The university conucts admission in two sessions-January and July.

faqs.question: When are Annamalai University Distance Education application forms out?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University DDE offers BFA at the undergraduate (UG) level and MA, MBA, MCom, MFA, MSc, and MSW courses at the Postgraduate (PG) level. Candidates who are interested in getting admission to UG or PG courses offered by this university can apply by visiting the official website. Students can apply for UG admission program-level courses if they have a 10+2 degree in the relevant subject from a university that is known to be good. Admission to courses in UG programs is based only on merit. For PG-level courses, applicants must have a Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field from a university that is recognized. To get into the PG Diploma program, students must have a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university with at least a 50% mark.

review_summary.college_name: NIIS Institute of Business Administration (NIIS-IBA) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: College has lots of opportunities.

content.Placements: Approximately 70–80% of students get placements from the college. The college has a very strong and efficient placement cell. The Placements Cell conducts placement drives for on-campus placements. The top recruiters in our course are from the financial sector. The average package for our course is 4-6 LPA at our college. I also get placed through campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-developed infrastructure with all the required facilities available. The classrooms of the college are spacious and supplied with projectors. The college has Wi-Fi for both students and faculty on the entire campus. The library of the college is big and stocked. The college has a hostel, which is very near the campus. Hostel rooms are big and furnished. The quality of the food in the mess is good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is quite good and provides good placements.

content.Placements: Around 67% of students got placed. Recruiting companies like Tech Mahindra, UPS Logistics, ICICI Bank, SBI Capital, etc., come here. Around 60-70% of students got internships in companies like Parle, Axis, Pantaloons etc. Business development executive, sales officer, HR executive, finance associate, etc., roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel and college facilities are good. The environment is friendly. The infrastructure is good. The college has computer labs, library, and good classrooms. Wi-Fi facilities are available in computer labs and library. All books related to the courses are available for students. Additional facilities are also available on campus. Food and hostel facilities are good. The food is quite good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are good, and students play in groups and are engaged in different activities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It gives good placement support, and faculty members are good.

content.Placements: About 60% of students got placed, and good companies are involved in placements and internships. Many companies are incorporated for jobs. The salary package offered is 2 LPA to 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra and others. The placement support is also quite good.
content.Infrastructure: It has good facilities, and the infrastructure is also good. The quality of the hostel, mess, canteen, and other facilities is also good. The facilities in the mess and hostel are quite good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and always provide support with studies. 37% is the passing percentage. Exams are also taken at the right time. Industry visits are quite good. Faculty members also help in placements.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of good placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 70% of students from the actual strength got placed in good companies. The average package offered by the companies is 4.5 LPA. Most of the students get placed in good companies through campus drives. The average package offered by the companies is 4-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and the library are well-maintained. You can get 3-times food per day from the canteen. Medical facilities are available nearby.
content.Faculty: Some professors are less experienced. But overall, the professors are cooperative and helpful. They teach well and provide good study materials. Semester exams are good and smoothly managed. Some professors have average knowledge. They are cooperative and helpful though.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements and good professors.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered in our course was 16 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Reliance, Byjus, Asian Paints, Pantaloons, and Sun Pharmaceutical visit our campus for placements. Above 60% of students from our course get an internship. It provides grooming to excellence and leadership skills. In placement time, our teachers are guiding a lot. They motivate us a lot.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi labs, the best library, a well-groomed room, and the best food. One of the best things is it provides a car to consult a doctor. It provides the best parking. It has good gardens. The library has many books. Students play both indoor and outdoor games.

NIIS Institute of Business Administration (NIIS-IBA) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.

The infrastructure of my college is very good.

A/C classrooms and also PPT presentation is compulsory.

reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Even classrooms are equipped with projectors. The college consists of 2 labs for master's degree students and 2 labs for a bachelor's degree. Hostel facilities are also very good, and the wardens are very good and well mannered.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well developed. Quality of labs & class room is also good. Hostel rooms are not that bad. Food available in the canteen are not best. But you can eat. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: It was the best college with the best faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was really nice. The college provides good condition labs as there was a minimum of 50 computers in a lab. There were 4 labs on the campus. The food available in the hostel was good, and three students share a single room. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the service and hospitality by the staff and faculty. The infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available on the campus are the best. A standby power generator is also provided on the campus to avoid any inconvenience that may occur during occasional power shutdowns that happen due to maintenance works. The entire campus is enabled with wireless computing network that allows faculty, staff and students to log on to the internet any time. There is an internet lab powered by dedicated leased lines.

reviews.review_heading: For the middle class, this college is the best.
reviews.review_text: There is approximately 6-8 lab. The classrooms are well and air-conditioned. I stay outside of college so I don't know about the hostel. In the hostel, there are so many rules and regulations. So for girls, a hostel is best. For boys, there are many options to stay outside.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure looks like heaven. We have a swimming pool, outdoor and indoor stadium.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice it looks like heaven. We have a swimming pool, outdoor and indoor stadium. We have a basketball court, gym facility also. We have many food malls on the campus, and the campus is full of trees with a good environmental condition.
